questions.questionText: According to the ACR BI-RADS 5th edition, which one of the suspicious calcifications has the **lowest** PPV?

options.text: Fine pleomorphic
Amorphous
Fine-linear or fine-linear branching
Coarse heterogenous

questions.explanation:

- 此題引用Korean J Radiol. 2019 Dec;20(12):1646-1652.的結果。Amorphous calcification: PPV 7.2-10.5% 最低。
- DI: Breast:
	- Amorphous: grouped 7%惡性，可能是low-grade DCIS, ADH
	- Coarse heterogenous 13%惡性，但>70歲只有3%。
- BI-RADS
		- 雙側多處 coarse heterogeneous/amorphous: benign
	- A single group of coarse heterogeneous: PPV <15% ，算4B
	- Amorphous PPV約20%，應該算4B。
	- Fine pleomorphic PPV約30%，應該算4B。
	- Fine-linearPPV約70%，應該算4C。

questions.questionText: 若一名 50 歲無症狀婦女來做乳房攝影篩檢，看到左乳外上象限有一＂結構扭曲＂（architectural distortion），關於後續處置方式，以下何者為**非**?

options.text: 需先排除該部位有否受傷或是開刀的病史。

承選項 B，若 spot compression views 仍然顯示結構扭曲，而超音波為正常，則需做乳房攝影導引方式之切片(mammographic-guided needle localization or stereotactic /tomosynthesis-guided biopsy)。

questions.questionText: Which one of the following statements is **wrong**?

options.text: The detection of more disease at breast MRI has not been translated into improved outcomes.
Abbreviated MRI had been reported to have equivalent diagnostic accuracy compared to full protocols.
DWI are sensitive enough to replace contrast-enhanced breast MRI.

The American Cancer Society and the American College of Radiology categorize women with a lifetime risk of more than 20% as high risk, and recommend annual screening MRI and mammography in this subset of women.

questions.explanation:
[[2019 R Breast MRI State of the Art.pdf]]
- ADC cutoff: 0.92x10^-3 mm2/s  91.5% sensitivity and 86.5% specificity.
- DCE-MRI alone showed 97.9% sensitivity and 75.7% specificity.

## Mass
Mass internal enhancement pattern

- **Homogeneous** internal enhancement is uniform and can be seen in both benign and malignant lesions.
- **Heterogeneous** internal enhancement describes non-uniform enhancement within the lesion and is suspicious, especially in the presence of rim enhancement.
- **Rim enhancement** is a highly suspicious finding for cancer, representing malignancy in upto 84% of cases, although this finding is only seen in 16% of cancers. Potential pitfalls are a peripherally enhancing inflammatory cyst or fat necrosis, both of which can demonstrate rim enhancement and are discussed later in the chapter.
- **Dark internal septations** are highly specific for a benign fibroadenoma (>95% positive predictive value). A fibroadenoma will also typically be circumscribed and hyperintense on T2-weighted images. A hyalinizing fibroadenoma, typically seen in older women, rarely enhances.

## Non-mass enhancement (NME)
## BPE
[[BI-RADS 2013.pdf]]
- BPE指的是正常fibroglandular tissue 的顯影。
- BPE可以被描述為minimal, mild, moderate, or marked.
- 評估BPE在第一張術後影像(90s)，之後會progressive enhancement，顯影的gland也會變多。
- 影響BPE的因素：
	- 不論有月經或更年期，無論月經週期為何，都會有BPE。
	- BPE與腺體組織的量並不直接相關。Extreme dense breast的BPE可能幾乎沒有，但年輕女性dense breast會有BPE。Scattered fibroglandular可能有marked BPE。
	- BPE是基於腺體組織的量進行評估的，而不是整個乳房的體積。
	- BPE在月經週期的黃體期通常更加明顯。對於elective MRI，建議在**月經週期早期(7-14天/follicular phase)**安排，以減少BPE。
- 臨床意義：
	- 起初人們認為BPE可能會干擾判讀。但研究已經顯示，BPE增加可能有更多call back，但不會減少cancer detection rate。
	- BPE的描述應該是乳房MRI報告的一部分。
	- 對於已經被診斷出癌症的患者，無論月經週期或有沒有月經，都應該進行MRI以進行分期。
- 增強模式：
	- Symmetric 對稱增強：良性BPE，通常看起來像鏡像增強mirror-image enhancement。
	- Preferential enhancement：靠近血管會先顯影。如UOQ和乳房下半部，會有sheets of enhancement。
	- Asymmetric 非對稱增強：表示一側乳房的顯影比另一側更明顯，可能是由於良性或惡性原因。

[^1]  https://dps2020.rsna.org/exhibit/?exhibit=BR140-ED-X
- 腺體組織的量和mammography density有關。BPE則和很多因素有關，不會correlation。
- tamoxifen會減少BPE，停藥會rebound。homone replacement會增強BPE。
- Pregnancy
- 哺乳
- chemotherapy, R/T
- BRCA mutation

questions.questionText: 下列 Digital Breast Tomosynthesis 何者為**錯**?

options.text: Most DBT units use a tungsten (W) anode target with a rhodium (Rh) or aluminum (Al) filter.
Increased breast compression thickness leads to increased average glandular dose for both FFDM and DBT.
Anode target and filter combinations produce x-rays with lower mean energy, which leads to a lower average glandular dose compared with that of analog-film mammography.
If FFDM is replaced with synthesized 2D mammography, the radiation dose can be reduced by 45%.

questions.explanation:
All of these anode target and filter combinations produce x-rays with higher mean energy, which leads to a lower average glandular dose compared with that of analog-film mammography, but an equivocally to slightly higher dose compared with that of FFDM.
Half-value layers (HVLs) of an X-ray beam, defined as the thickness of a reference material (aluminum is most often used) needed to attenuate the beam intensity by half, are commonly used to characterize its beam quality. The higher the HVL, the higher mean energy the X-ray beam has.

D. 正確

questions.questionText: 下列關於結構扭曲Architectural distortion，在Digital 2D 和 Digital breast Tomosynthesis 的比較，何者敘述**錯誤**?

options.text: Digital breast Tomosynthesis 可以發現更多的結構扭曲
針對結構扭曲，Digital breast Tomosynthesis 發現乳癌的 positive predictive value 比 Digital 2D mammography 較高(73.6% vs 50.7%; p < 0.001)
當 Digital breast Tomosynthesis 發現結構扭曲，而超音波沒有發現時，惡性的機率較低
以上皆正確

questions.explanation:
AJR 2017; 209:1162–1167.
- A. Architectural distortion was more commonly detected in the DBT group than the DM group (0.14% vs 0.07%).
- B. **對於Architectural distortion，DBT PPV 較低(和其他研究較不同)**。The PPV(positive predictive value) of architectural distortion for malignancy was significantly lower in the DBT group than the DM group (50.7% vs 73.6%).
- C. In the DBT group, architectural distortion without correlative findings on ultrasound was **less likely to represent** malignancy than was architectural distortion with correlative findings on ultrasound (29.2% vs 66.5%.)
	- 但還是有接近30%可能是惡性，所以還是建議biopsy。

questions.questionText: 下列 Digital Breast Tomosynthesis 何者為**錯**?

options.text: At DBT, the breast is compressed and held stationary between the compression paddle and the detector, in a procedure similar to that used at digital mammography.
The DBT x-ray tube moves in an arc overhead, executing a series of low-dose exposures at preset intervals, each from a different angle.
A DBT system can acquire images in standard mammographic orientations (ie, craniocaudal, mediolateral oblique(MLO), and mediolateral).
DBT can also be performed with spot compression and magnification views

questions.explanation:
RadioGraphics 2015; 35:975–990
- 除了Siemens MAMMOMAT其他都有spot compression功能。但沒有放大的功能，幾何放大用的air gap沒辦法在DBT下使用。
- 在傳統2D mammography，可以用幾何放大(geometric magnification)評估microcalcification。

### Antiscatter Grids
### reconstruction algorithms

## Arifacts

[[2019 RG Digital Breast Tomosynthesis - Physics, Artifacts, and Quality Control Considerations.pdf]]

### Blurring-Ripple Artifacts
- Blurring-Ripple artifact (模糊-波紋假影)
- 和X光管sweep方向垂直(perpendicular)
- DBT的small number of projections限制了out-of-plane的noise suppression。投影數量增加，Blurring-Ripple artifact 會減少，projection和reconstruction section同樣多時就不會有Blurring-Ripple artifact
- 用 iterative reconstruction 的 Blurring-Ripple Artifacts會比 FBP(filtered back projection)來的少
- reconstructed section和clips, coarse calcification平行時(in-plane)也不會有Blurring-Ripple Artifacts
- 可能造成clip延長，margin模糊，皮膚可能變厚
- reconstructed sections和object的距離越長，artifact也會變得越來越長，會變得像彈簧一樣(vertical train of ripples, “slinky” artifact)
- 後處理軟體可改善，用特製的 DBT-specific markers也可以。
- 重組的synthesized mammography也會有Blurring-Ripple Artifacts

questions.questionText: Regarding the descriptions of “Blurring-Ripple Artifacts” of digital breast tomosynthesis (DBT), which one of followings is **incorrect**?

options.text: Related to the small number of projections acquired at DBT
Limits suppression of anatomic noise from imaging planes outside of the reconstructed section.
Are seen parallel to the x-ray tube sweep direction.
In principle, the artifacts decreases with an increasing number of projections.
None of the above.

questions.explanation:
垂直(perpendicular)
B. 雖然正確但主詞是small number of projections

questions.questionText: 下列 Digital Breast Tomosynthesis Blurring-Ripple Artifacts 何者為**錯**?

options.text: More prominent with iterative reconstruction than with FBP.
Related to the small number of projections acquired at DBT.
Blurring-ripple artifacts also are present at synthesized mammography as streak or halo artifacts surrounding metallic objects.
It also produces edge blurring and elongation of biopsy or surgical clips.

questions.explanation:
用 iterative reconstruction 的 Blurring-Ripple Artifacts會比 FBP(filtered back projection)來的少

### Truncation Artifacts
- 由於掃描角度小，detector size的限制，breast 邊緣的影像可能有異常
- “stair-step” effect, (橘色)區域不是每個projection都有照到，只有比較邊邊的有
- “bright-edge” artifact 影像有經過breast造成attenuation，但機器以為沒有，對X光attenuation估計過高導致。(紅色)
- 改善：更大的detector size，X光tube sweep時對detector加dynamic detector tilt

questions.questionText: 下列 Digital Breast Tomosynthesis Truncation Artifacts 何者為**錯**?

options.text: Because of the small (less than 180°) sweep angle and limited detector size.
Breast tissue captured only by the peripheral-most acquisitions does not fall within the reconstructed volume.
Truncation artifacts can be minimized with the use of a larger detector size or with a dynamic detector tilt that is concentric with the x-ray tube sweep angle..
A “bright-edge” artifact with overestimation of x-ray attenuation at the margins is not a truncation artifact.

questions.explanation:
也是truncation artifact的一種。

### Loss of Skin and Superficial Tissue Resolution
- Desne breast機器要用較高能量的輻射，對只穿過skin, 皮下組織，沒穿過breast tissue的X光來說能量太高，造成burn-out effect。
(A) DBT: 有一些鋸齒狀很白的東西(jagged)，皮膚，皮下評估受限。(B) 重組2D也還是有 (C) MLO view FFDM 沒有artifact。

questions.questionText: 下列 Digital Breast Tomosynthesis Loss of skin and superficial tissue resolution artefact 何者為**錯**?

options.text: occurs in patients with large or dense breasts..
At the higher radiation doses required, peripheral x-rays that traverse only skin and subcutaneous tissue at higher energy levels cause saturation of the detector, resulting in a burn-out effect
DBT image of the right breast shows a jagged appearance of the skin and loss of detail in the dermal and subcutaneous tissues.
Synthesized mammogram dose not show the same artifacts as on the DBT image.

questions.explanation: 重組的影像一樣會有。

questions.questionText: Which one is **wrong** about hepatic cavernous hemangioma?

options.text: Most common solid benign liver tumor
3rd most common liver tumor
Rarely seen in young children
May enlarge during pregnancy

questions.explanation:
- 最常見的肝良性腫瘤，4%人有。成人較多，女性較多(5:1)
- 第二常見的liver tumor，最多的是metastases

### Kasabach-Merritt syndrome
- **Thrombocytopenia**, caused by sequestration and destruction of platelets within a large cavernous hemangioma, occasionally occurs in **infants** .
- Hemangioma thrombocytopenia syndrome: Rapidly growing vascular tumor ==> thrombocytopenia, microangiopathic hemolytic anemia and consumptive coagulopathy

## 影像表現
### 超音波的表現很多樣化
* 典型表現：[A-C] 典型的小的跟大的 hemangioma
  * 很多很小亮亮的 small (<3 cm in diameter), well defined, homogeneous, and hyperechoic[A]
    * 因內有很多cavernous sinuses，wall造成反射會hyperechoic。
  * 也可能是一個很大的lobulated echogenic mass。大的hemangioma通常是 heterogeneous中間會有 hypoechoic的部分，可能是 fibrous collagen scars, large vascular spaces, thrombosis, ... [C]，而邊緣可能像貝殼一樣 (a tendency toward scalloping margin) [B]
* 67 ~ 79% hemangiomas是 hyperechoic，其中58 ~ 73%是 homogeneous。
* Atypical findings: [D-F]
  * 中間較不均質(a nonhomogeneous central area)，會有 hypoechoic portions，可能是 uniformly granular 顆粒狀 or 花邊 lacelike  [D-F]
  * 邊緣是 echogenic的，粗細都可以 [E-G]
  * (D) hypoechoic的 hemangioma。有很薄的 echogenic border.
  * (E) 左邊典型，右邊 atypical，有很厚的echogenic border，中間hypoechoic.
  * (F) 中間 hypoechoic 且rim irregular echogenic.
* 少見的 findings: [G-I]
  * 如果病人有fatty liver，那hemangioma可以是 hypoechoic
  * (G) Exophytic hemangioma.
  * (H) Hypoechoic hemangioma with increased through transmission。Posterior acoustic enhancement，做angiography可能會是 hypervascularity。算典型但很少看到(suggestive but infrequently encountered sign)
  * (I)有鈣化的也很罕見

Hemangiomas的特點是** extremely slow blood flow**，慢到 color/duplex Doppler 也看不到。至於power Doppler能不能看到則有爭議。Occasional lesions may show a low to midrange kilohertz (kHz) shift from both peripheral and central blood vessels.

### CEUS
Arterial phase：
* hemangiomas show **peripheral puddles and pools** that are brighter than the adjacent enhanced liver parenchyma.
* no linear vessels.

Portal venous phase:
* 會有 **centripetal progression** of the enhancement leads to complete globular fill-in, with **sustained enhancement** equal to or better than the liver in the portal venous phase, which may last for several minutes
* 顯影可能快或慢，也可能過很久都不會全部enhancement (may be incomplete) [Video 4.6]
* Rumack 幾乎所有hemangioma都用CEUS診斷，就不需要再排其他檢查了

## 追蹤
腹超常看到 hemangioma，如果每個要再排其他檢查確認會花太多錢。
* 典型的lesion，一般都是保守處理，甚至不追蹤，頂多3-6月追蹤看有沒有變化。It is considered acceptable practice to manage some patients conservatively without confirmation of the diagnosis.
* 病人如果 (1) 有已知的惡性腫瘤 (2) HCC高風險族群 (3) 肝功能異常 (4) 有些和肝臟有關的 symptoms (5) Echo是 atypical pattern，那還是要加做 CEUS, CT, or MRI 來確認是不是是hemangioma
	* 有些lesion，有可能會被誤認為hemangioma。如colon cancer metastases，vascular primary tumor (neuroendocrine tumor,  small HCCs)
  *  在Caturelli et al.的一篇前瞻性研究中，收錄了1982位有新診斷肝硬化病人，這些echogenic lesions，50%是hemangioma，50%是 HCC！！其中1648位肝硬化病人，有新出現的 echogenic tumor，雖然看起來像hemangioma，但全都被確診為 HCC！！==所以在high risk病人中做進一步檢查確認診斷是必要的。==

Ref:
1. Diagnostic Ultrasound, 5th, Rumack

### Hemorrhagic cysts
- 傳統在US區分hemorrhagic cyst方法：時間。Hemorrhagic cyst將在1-2個月經週期後消失(6-12wks後追蹤)
- Ruptured follicle可能會內出血，變大變成homogenous cystic mass，會有ITT(顯影增強)，腫瘤不太會這樣。
- 典型表現 lacy “fishnet appearance” 像漁網的花紋。Doppler看不到flow。
- Cystic mass, 也會有 a hyperechoic solid mural nodule (Rokitansky nodule or dermoid plug). 10%會有septum
- MRI: T1 bright，FS不會抑制掉。不會顯影。基本上是也是teratoma，可能會有牙齒...奇怪的東西。頭髮可能以"dot-dash" pattern表現。
- 停經後婦女也可能會排卵ovulate。但late postmenopausal women **不會**有 hemorrhagic cyst，看到必須先當malignancy。

questions.explanation:
Paraduodenal pancreatitis is usually classified into two forms, pure and segmental:
- pure form: affects exclusively the groove
- segmental form: extends to the pancreatic head despite a clear predominance in the groove
Paraduodenal pancreatitis has been suggested to occur via increased viscosity of the pancreatic juice caused by **alcohol**, thus predisposing to crystal formation and increased production of protein, resulting in **stone** formation. Impeding the minor papilla either pathoanatomically or functionally this process incapacitates exocrine pancreatic function.

The image findings includes: a “sheetlike” curvilinear crescentic shape infiltrations or frank soft tissue in the groove between the pancreatic head and duodenum, with increasing delayed enhancement; thickening of perifocal duodenal wall; cysts in both the duodenal wall and pancreaticoduodenal groove.

questions.explanation:
Transitional cell carcinoma is typically a tumor of older patients, with the average age of presentation being 65. There is a strong male predilection (M:F = 4:1)
The ureter is the least common location for transitional cell carcinoma (TCC) of the urinary tract, 2-3 times less common that TCC of the renal pelvis and 100 times less common that transitional cell carcinoma of the bladder. It accounts for only 1% of all upper urinary tract malignancies.
- proximal third: 3%
- mid third: 24%
- distal third: 73%
In 2-5% of patients, bilateral tumors are found
1. papillary
- account for 60% tumors
- multiple frond-like papillary projections
- tend to be low grade and invasion beyond the mucosa is a late feature
2. non-papillary
- sessile or nodular tumors
- tend to be high grade with early invasion beyond the mucosa
Smaller or polypoid tumors may be seen as filling defects, and if they cause partial long-standing obstruction may result in focal dilatation of the ureter at the site of the tumor. This may lead to the so-called goblet sign, best seen on retrograde ureterograph

questions.questionText: 在先天性心臟病(congenital heart diseases)中，有關「心室」(ventricles)和「大動脈」(great arteries)「接合」(connections)的描述，下列何者**錯誤**？

options.text: 正常和諧(concordant)的接合(connections)是左心室(left ventricle)到主動脈(aorta)，右心室(right ventricle)到肺動脈(pulmonary artery)。
在「大動脈轉位」(transposition of the great arteries; TGA)中，異常不和諧(discordant)的接合(connections)是左心室(left ventricle)到肺動脈(pulmonary artery)，右心室(right ventricle)到主動脈(aorta)。
在「右心室雙出口」(double outlet of right ventricle; DORV)的病人，兩條大動脈（主動脈和肺動脈）都源出自於右心室 (right ventricle)。
在罕見的「解剖矯正大動脈錯位」(anatomical corrected malposition; ACM)的接合(connections)是左心室(left ventricle)到主動脈(aorta)，右心室(right ventricle)到肺動脈(pulmonary artery)，但是主動脈位於肺動脈的左前方。
以上的四項描述都沒有錯誤，都是正確的。

questions.questionText: 關於 pulmonary mucormycosis 下列何者**錯誤**?

options.text: A fungal infection often seen in immunocompromised patients.
Early imaging may show peribronchial ground-glass opacity, then progresses to consolidation, nodules or masses.

Halo sign is characteristics of mucormycosis.

questions.explanation:
The reverse halo sign has been shown to be a specific sign of mucormycosis, occurring in 19%–94% of patients with PM.
- **A) TRUE** — RadioGraphics 文獻開宗明義指出 PM 是好發於免疫抑制患者的真菌感染。
- **B) TRUE** — 文獻明確描述早期影像表現為 peribronchial ground-glass opacity，之後進展為 consolidation、nodules 或 masses。
- **C) TRUE** — 經支氣管鏡取樣辨識菌絲形態可幫助確認診斷並與 IPA 鑑別。
- **D) ❌ FALSE** — 這是關鍵考點。**Reverse halo sign（反暈徵）** 才是 PM 的特徵性表現（約 54–67% 出現），而 **halo sign** 是 invasive pulmonary aspergillosis（IPA）的特徵。EORTC/MSGERC 指引也指出 reverse halo sign 在 PM 中出現頻率遠高於 IPA（54% vs 6%）。選項把 halo sign 說成 mucormycosis 的特徵，張冠李戴。

[!tip] 記憶口訣 **Halo → Aspergillosis** ｜ **Reverse Halo → Mucormycosis**

methanol poisoning. Selective or predominant involvement of the putamina with relative **sparing** of the globi pallidi is suggestive of methanol poisoning

High signal intensity on T1-weighted images of the pituitary gland and the hypothalamus can be depicted but is less common.

questions.questionText: 下列 2017 ACR TI-RADS system 應用何者最正確？

options.text: If nodules with calcifications that cause strong acoustic shadowing limiting assessment of echogenicity and composition, the grading is at least TR3
If the margin cannot be determined, add 2 points in terms of margin assessment
If there is large comet tail foci, add 1 point in terms of echogenic foci assessment
If there is lymph node with hilum flow rather than peripheral flow, it warrants aspiration

questions.explanation:
- A. 如果鈣化的acoustic shadowing造成評估困難，最好 best to assume that the **nodule is solid** and assign 2 points for composition and 1 point for echogenicity. 至少3分
- B. 應該給0分
- C. 應該給0分
	- “Large comet-tail artifacts” are echogenic foci with V-shaped echoes >1 mm deep to them. 在cyst內看到，和 **colloid** 有關，強烈暗示為良性(benignity)  給0分
	-  Small comet-tail artifacts可能在 solid components的Punctate echogenic foci 或spongiform nodules中看到
- D. Hilum有flow是ok的。Suspicious LN需要FNA。
	- Suspicious LN meta包含 globular shape, loss of the normal echogenic hilum, **peripheral** flow rather than hilar flow, heterogeneity with cystic components, and punctate echogenic foci(may represent **microcalcifications**) 此時LN須FNA。

SWI uses spin echo (SE) sequence

questions.questionText: 關於心臟核磁共振造影(Cardiovascular Magnetic Resonance，CMR)的安全性，下列何者**錯誤**？

options.text: 接受過機械瓣膜(mechanical valve)置換手術患者，可以安全接受核磁共振造影檢查。
核磁共振造影對冠狀動脈金屬支架不會造成影響。
接受過關節置換手術的患者應避免核磁共振造影。
幽閉恐懼症(claustrophobic)患者接受核磁共振造影檢查時可考慮給予口服鎮定劑。
植入式心律去顫器(Implantable cardioverter-defibrillator)患者在特殊影像設置條件下，仍可以安全進行核磁共振造影檢查

questions.explanation:
[[2021 中華民國放射線醫學會 MRI 安全指南.pdf]]
- A. 對於 prosthetic heart valves 和 annuloplasty rings 而言，進行 MRI 檢查是安全的。與心臟收縮施相比，MRI 施加在心臟瓣膜假體上的吸引力很小。文獻上也沒有造成傷害的報告。
- B. 所有市售的冠狀動脈支架都可以在 1.5T/3T MRI 檢查，但有條件：
	- 最大全身平均 SAR 為 2 W / kg。
	- 每個序列掃描最多 15 分鐘。
	- 沒有已知的由鐵磁性材料製成的冠狀動脈支架，因此無需等待 6 週或更長時間
- C. 人工關節為可能的禁忌。要看其材質。
- E. ICD, pacemaker要看是否 MRI 相容，置入後六周後才能於1.5T MRI檢查。

questions.questionText: 光電效應容易發生在什麼狀況?

options.text: 原子序小
入射能量高
內層電子
以上皆是

questions.questionText: 下列關於光電效應 (photoelectric effect)的描述何者**錯誤** ?

options.text: 主要與內層軌道電子作用
當光子能量增加時，光電效應發生的機率增加
當光子入射的物質原子序愈高時，光電效應發生的機率增加
會同時放出特性輻射 (characteristic x-rays)

questions.questionText: 曝露於 X 光透視造影下的皮膚潛在反應，若不考慮症狀開始發生的時間，下列症狀何者的劑量閾值（approximate threshold dose）最高？

options.text: 次發性潰瘍（secondary ulceration）
永久脫毛（permanent epilation）
二級真皮萎縮（second phase dermal atrophy）
濕性脫屑（moist desquamation）

questions.explanation:
來源?
Radiation-induced skin injuries
- \> **2 Gy** are known to result in erythema
- \> **7 Gy** permanent epilation will occur
- \> **12 Gy** delayed skin necrosis

questions.questionText: 根據 AJCC cancer staging manual 8th，Classification of lung cancers with multiple lesions 下列何者不包括?

options.text: Second primary tumors
Multifocal lung adenocarcinomas with ground-glass/lepidic features
Multiple lung nodules
Diffuse pneumonic-type adenocarcinoma

questions.explanation:
multiple lung nodules 包含了benign 跟malignant solid nodules，但是只有確定malignant solid nodule 才被包含在AJCC 8th staging 中 (either second primary or intrapulmonary metastasis)
[AJCC 8th](https://acsjournals.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.3322/caac.21390) 包括
- SECOND PRIMARY LUNG CANCER
- SEPARATE TUMOR NODULE (INTRAPULMONARY METASTASIS)
- MULTIFOCAL GG/L NODULES
- PNEUMONIC TYPE OF ADENOCARCINOMA

questions.questionText: About stereotactic body radiation therapy (SBRT), which description is wrong?

options.text: Currently, SBRT is the standard of care for early-stage node-negative NSCLC (T1N0M0 and T2N0M0) in patients who are not surgical candidates and in those who decline surgery.
Late radiation fibrosis can demonstrate a well-defined mass-like consolidation, which can be larger than the original tumor and lacks features like air bronchograms and straight margins.
The CT features of late radiation fibrosis after SBRT often continue to evolve for more than 4 years after lung SBRT.
The presence of interstitial lung disease on the pretreatment images, especially honeycombing, has been associated with an increased risk of radiation pneumonitis.

questions.explanation:
RadioGraphics 2018; 38:1312–1336

- can continue to evolve > 2 years after lung SBRT, although evolution after 4 years has rarely been described.
- modified conventional pattern can further evolve into a scarlike or masslike fibrosis at follow-up, mimicks a recurrence.

questions.questionText: Hepatic hypervascular tumor 何者正確?

options.text: Hemangiomas are markedly T2 hyperintense, nearly cystlike in signal intensity; and showed uniformly enhancement in delayed (>5 minutes) contrast-enhanced images.
A central scar of focal nodular hyperplasia (FNH) is classically T1 hypointense,T2 hyperintense and delayed enhancement

Hypervascular metastases enhance earlier on arterial phase images, and show washout on delayed images. Hypervascular metastases typically arise from primary neuroendocrine tumors (eg, pancreatic islet cell tumor, carcinoid tumor, or pheochromocytoma), renal cell carcinoma, thyroid carcinoma, choriocarcinoma, melanoma, and sarcomas.
以上敘述皆正確

questions.questionText: Which one can cause reversed diastolic flow in the transplant renal artery at spectral Doppler ultrasound?

options.text: renal vein thrombosis
allograft torsion
severe allograft rejection
All of the above

questions.explanation:
Reversed diastolic flow in the transplant renal artery at spectral Doppler US is highly suggestive of renal vein thrombosis but may also be seen less frequently with disorders such as allograft torsion, severe allograft rejection, or acute tubular necrosis.
Similar to allograft rejection, ATN is another important cause of early renal allograft dysfunction, and routine clinical assessment does not allow reliable distinction between the two entities.
Radionuclide scintigraphy may be helpful but does not allow reliable differentiation between the two entities given overlapping findings. Use of fluorine 18 (18F) fluorodeoxyglucose (FDG) PET/CT has been investigated for noninvasive differentiation between these two important diagnoses. However, percutaneous biopsy remains the standard of reference

questions.questionText: 關於 retroperitoneal tumor,何者為**非**?

options.text: Of the primary retroperitoneal neoplasms, 70%–80% are malignant in nature.
Leiomyosarcoma is the most common primary retroperitoneal sarcoma.
Tumors that arise from the chromaffin cells of the adrenal medulla are called pheochromocytomas, and those that arise in an extraadrenal location (10%) are referred to as paragangliomas.
Lymphoma is the most common retroperitoneal malignancy.

questions.explanation:
Ref: Imaging of uncommon retroperitoneal masses. Radiographics. 2011 Jul-Aug;31(4):949-76.
- **Lymphoma** 是最常見的 retroperitoneal malignancy (33%)
- **Liposarcoma** 是最常見的 primary retroperitoneal sarcoma (33%)，第二名是 Leiomyosarcoma (28%)。第三名是 Malignant fibrous histiocytoma(UPS = undifferentiated pleomorphic sarcoma) (19%)

questions.questionText: Which of the following about benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH) is NOT true?

options.text: BPH is not believed to be a risk factor for prostate cancer.
The specificity of the serum PSA assay for prostate cancers is lower in men with obstructive symptoms than in those who are asymptomatic.
Transrultrasonography slightly underestimated volume by 4.4 percent, whereas transabdominal ultrasonography underestimated volume by 55.7 percent.
Making diagnosis of BPH does not require histologic confirmation, and prostate biopsy is only warranted if there is concern about prostate cancer.
High PSA values can occur in men with BPH. The serum PSA value and prostate volume have a log-linear relationship.

questions.explanation:
TRUS slightly underestimated W by 4.4% (95% CI 10.5, 1.7) while transabdominal ultrasound **overestimated** it by 55.7% (95% CI 31.8, 79.6).
The diagnosis does not require histologic confirmation. A prostate biopsy is only warranted if there is concern about prostate cancer such as an asymmetric or nodular gland on digital rectal examination (DRE) or an increased or rising prostate-specific antigen (PSA) level.

questions.questionText: HSG reveals a distorted and enlarged uterine cavity with a smooth ﬁlling defect. Which of the following is the most likely diagnosis?

options.text: Polyp
Synechiae
Leiomyomas
DES exposure

questions.explanation:
- Leiomyoma: **Enlarged, elongated and distorted uterine cavity** due to intramural leiomyoma
- Synechiae: Irregular cavity with a linear **filling defect.**
- DES exposure (**T-shape**): narrowed irregular endocervical canal and small endometrial cavity, with a shortened upper uterine segment.
- Endometrial polyp: **pedunculated** or sessile **filling defects** within the cavity.

questions.questionText: Which of the following is **NOT** correct about granulosa cell tumor?

options.text: Potential for malignant behavior
Commonly bilateral
Multilocular (sponge-like) cystic mass
Associated with endometrial thickening

questions.questionText: 下列何者為**非**？

options.text: Isolated stress fractures of the cuboid are common.

Involvement of the inferolateral aspect of the cuboid suggests that repeated compression of the peroneus longus tendon against the peroneal sulcus is important as well as tension by the long plantar ligament that resulted in tensile edema in the cuboid crest.
Plantar fascia dysfunction likely affected the longitudinal arch and increased stress on the secondary stabilizers of the mid-foot.
The disproportionate number of women suggested that, in some patients, decreased bone density may also be an important factor

questions.explanation: rare.

questions.questionText: 有關 Transient Osteoporosis of Hip 下列何者為**非**?

options.text: Most often seen in women during the third trimester of pregnancy and in middle-aged men
Joint space is usually narrowed
Osteopenia diffusely involves femoral head and neck; may be confused with AVN or femoral neck stress fracture
In pregnancy, symptoms tend to resolve in the first few postpartum months

questions.questionText: Regarding torsional abnormality, which of the following is correct.

options.text: The natural history is usually favorable, without treatment being necessary.
Regular follow-up with CT or MRI is necessary to observe interval change.
The factor affecting torsional abnormality is simple and well understood, and this abnormality is commonly caused by perinatal traumatic event.
Aggressive management is indicated in cases with non-symptomatic torsional abnormality.

questions.questionText: 下列有關 Atlanto-occipital assimilation 的敘述，何者為錯？

options.text: craniometry 常可見basilar invagination
和 atlanto-axial instability 無關
C0-C1 的活動度會下降
通常在 cevical spine lateral view 上可診斷

questions.questionText: Which one is wrong about focal fat-sparing in diffuse fatty liver?

options.text: Characteristic locations include: in porta hepatis, next to gallbladder bed, adjacent to falciform ligament / ligamentum venosum, and subcapsular skip areas
No mass effect
Contrast enhancement similar to normal liver
Decrease in signal intensity on opposed-phase gradient-echo T1WI

questions.explanation:
Pseudolesions (focal sparing) are better seen on out-of-phase imaging (**lack of decrease** in signal intensity on opposed-phase gradient-echo T1WI), but otherwise, appear normal and similar to the rest of the liver on T2 and contrast-enhanced sequences.
Important features are:
- absence of distortion of vessels that run through the region
- absence of mass effect

questions.questionText: Which one is **wrong** about ectopic pancreas?

options.text: Most common heterotopia within GI system
The most common location is gastric lesser curvature
May show central umbilication
Submucosa in one half

questions.explanation:
- presence of pancreatic tissue in the submucosal, muscularis or subserosal layers of the luminal GI tract outside the normal confines of the pancreas and lacking any anatomic or vascular connection with the main pancreas.
- 45% of the cases of ectopic pancreas discovered on upper gastrointestinal examination, the ectopic pancreatic tissue contains a central small collection of barium, i.e. a central niche or umbilication, indicative of the rudimentary duct’s draining orifice.On upper gastrointestinal examination, an ectopic pancreas appears as an extramucosal, smooth, broad-based lesion either along the greater curvature of the gastric antrum or in the proximal duodenum.

questions.questionText: Which is true?

options.text: Increasing age is not associated with poorer outcome in patients with closed traumatic brain injury.
Early clinical and radiologic findings in child abuse are of no prognostic value for neurodevelopmental outcome.
DWI has proven to be highly sensitive in the early detection of acute cerebral ischemia and seems promising in the evaluation of traumatic brain injury
Severe neurodevelopmental sequelae is uncommon in significant child abuse.

questions.explanation:
- A. In patients with TBI, an **increasing age** is significantly associated with **unfavorable** outcome at 6 months, in stepwise manner centered on a threshold of 40 years, independent of other prognostic factors. J Neurosci Rural Pract. 2012 May-Aug; 3(2): 131–135.
- B. Early clinical and radiological findings in ITBI are of prognostic value for neurodevelopmental outcome. Acta Paediatr. 2010 Sep;99(9):1329-36.
- C. Copy自Eur Radiol. 2003 Oct;13(10):2283-97.
- D. 找不到。但嚴重child abuse應該也有嚴重的後遺症。

questions.questionText: Which is **not** the common location of Diffuse axonal injury?

options.text: Corpus callosum
External capsule
Superior cerebral peduncle
Brain stem

questions.explanation: Characteristic locations for DAI lesions include the **gray-white matter junction** (especially in the frontal lobes because the axis of rotation of the head is posterior, allowing greater differences in momentum anteriorly), **corpus callosum** (especially the splenium), **internal capsules**, and dorsal midbrain and/or pons.

questions.questionText: A newborn has a palpable abdominal mass that is shown to be intrahepatic by ultrasound. The mass is large and multicystic with minimal solid tissue or internal vascularity. What is the primary diagnostic consideration?

options.text: Mesenchymal hamartoma
Hemangioma
Hepatocellular carcinoma
Hepatoblastoma

questions.explanation: Hepatic mesenchymal hamartomas are uncommon benign hepatic lesions which are mostly seen in children under the age of 2. It usually appears as a multiseptated cystic lesion interspersed with solid components. Detection is difficult for pedunculated lesions. In some lesions may be the predominance of solid structures.

questions.questionText: 下列何種含碘對比劑『不可』使用於蜘蛛網膜腔下(intrathecal)注射?

options.text: Omnipaque 300
Omnipaque 240
Omnipaque 180
Omnipaque 350

questions.reference: 中華民國放射線醫學會對比劑手冊；ACR Manual on Contrast Media
questions.explanation:
正解 **D**。鞘內注射只准**低濃度非離子單體**（如 Omnipaque 180/240/300、Iopamidol 300）；**高濃度 Omnipaque 350 禁用於鞘內**（高滲透壓神經毒性）。

→ [[iodinated-contrast-media]]

questions.questionText: 下列何種檢查使用含碘對比劑?

options.text: 顯影性磁振造影
雙重對比下消化道攝影
血管攝影
顯影性超音波攝影

questions.reference: 中華民國放射線醫學會對比劑手冊
questions.explanation:
正解 **C**。**血管攝影使用含碘對比劑**。顯影性磁振用釓劑、雙重對比下消化道用鋇劑＋空氣、顯影性超音波用微氣泡。

→ [[iodinated-contrast-media]]

questions.questionText: 下列何種檢查需要在動脈內注射含碘對比劑?

options.text: 顯影性磁振造影
雙重對比下消化道攝影
血管攝影
顯影性超音波攝影

questions.reference: 中華民國放射線醫學會對比劑手冊
questions.explanation:
正解 **C**。**血管攝影（angiography）於動脈內注射含碘對比劑**。其餘檢查不在動脈內注射含碘劑。

→ [[iodinated-contrast-media]]

questions.questionText: 下消化道攝影可能使用下列何種對比劑?

options.text: 鋇劑
含碘對比劑
以上皆是
以上皆非

questions.reference: 中華民國放射線醫學會對比劑手冊
questions.explanation:
正解 **C（以上皆是）**。下消化道攝影可用**鋇劑**或**含碘對比劑**（疑穿孔/吻合口漏時用水溶性含碘劑）。

→ [[iodinated-contrast-media]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following sign is not typical for intracapsular rupture of silicone breast implants?

options.text: Linguine sign
Snowstorm sign
Stepladder sign
Keyhole sign

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；RadioGraphics 2017;37(2):366-382
questions.explanation:
**Snowstorm sign為extracapsular rupture之超音波徵象**（游離矽膠散布於乳房實質造成瀰漫回音雜訊），非intracapsular rupture典型徵象，故(B)為非。

(A) 對：Linguine sign為intracapsular rupture典型MRI/US徵象（塌陷外殼漂浮）。
(B) **錯（正解）**：Snowstorm sign屬extracapsular rupture，非intracapsular。
(C) 對：Stepladder sign為intracapsular rupture超音波徵象之一。
(D) 對：Keyhole/noose sign為intracapsular rupture典型徵象。

→ [[breast-implant-rupture]]

questions.questionText: Concerning intrarenal aneurysms, which one is true?

options.text: they occur commonly in neurofibromatosis
the mycotic type is common
they occur commonly in angiomyolipoma
when calcified they are usually congenital or atherosclerotic
they are associated with aneurysms of the circle of Willis

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Genitourinary Tract Diseases, p.3
questions.explanation:
**腎內動脈瘤(intrarenal aneurysm)常見於腎血管肌脂瘤(angiomyolipoma)**，故(C)為正解。

(A) 錯：官方訂正為神經纖維瘤病中「罕見報告(rarely reported)」，非常見。
(B) 錯：黴菌性(mycotic)類型並非最常見類型。
(C) **對（正解）**：腎內動脈瘤常見於AML，DSA可見sunburst動脈期表現、onion peel靜脈期表現，並可伴micro-或macro-aneurysm。
(D) 錯：鈣化之腎內動脈瘤通常與結核病、神經纖維瘤病、結節性多動脈炎相關，非單純congenital/atherosclerotic。
(E) 錯：與Willis環動脈瘤之關聯非典型敘述。

→ [[renal-aml]]

questions.questionText: Patients with how large size of renal angiomyolipomas are recommended to receive prophylactic surgery or embolization to prevent hemorrhage.

options.text: >3 cm in diameter
>4 cm in diameter
>5 cm in diameter
>6 cm in diameter
>7 cm in diameter

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；UpToDate
questions.explanation:
**傳統慣例為腎血管肌脂瘤(AML)達40mm(4cm)時考慮介入**（栓塞或部分腎切除）以預防出血，故(B)為正解。

(A) 錯：3cm未達傳統介入門檻。
(B) **對（正解）**：>4cm(40mm)為傳統介入門檻；小型單發AML(<20mm)因生長緩慢通常不需追蹤。
(C)(D)(E) 錯：門檻過高，非標準建議值。

→ [[renal-aml]]

questions.questionText: 關於Tuberculous osteomyelitis，下列何者為非？

options.text: 早期容易以X光片診斷。
需以Biopsy或手術確定診斷。
有時會同時出現Tuberculous arthritis。
晚期常需要與腫瘤做鑑別診斷。

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Tuberculous osteomyelitis. J Bone Joint Surg Br. 1997 Jul;79(4):562-6
questions.explanation:
**早期結核性骨髓炎X光可能完全正常**，診斷常延遲（中位診斷時間報告達26.4個月），故(A)「早期容易以X光片診斷」為非。

(A) **錯（正解）**：早期infection X光可能正常，非容易診斷；診斷常延遲。
(B) 對：確定診斷需biopsy或手術取得組織培養/病理。
(C) 對：可合併Tuberculous arthritis。
(D) 對：晚期病灶常需與腫瘤做鑑別診斷。

→ [[tuberculous-osteomyelitis]]

questions.questionText: 關於Superficial thrombophlebitis，下列何者為非？

options.text: 患處常出現紅腫熱痛。
無顯影劑的CT常無法診斷superficial thrombophlebitis。
US常出現淺層靜脈無法壓扁。
在偵測Superficial thrombophlebitis時，CT優於US。

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Superficial thrombophlebitis. Radiopaedia. Henry Knipe and Dr Bruno
questions.explanation:
**偵測表淺血栓性靜脈炎時，US為標準檢查方式，並非CT優於US**，故(D)為非。

(A) 對：患處典型表現為紅腫熱痛（tender erythematous areas）。
(B) 對：無顯影劑CT常無法診斷此病灶。
(C) 對：US可見無法壓扁(incompressible)、曲張之表淺靜脈，伴管腔內回音與周圍脂肪層回音增強。
(D) **錯（正解）**：US優於CT，非CT優於US。

→ [[superficial-thrombophlebitis]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following disease is NOT shown as multifocal hypointense foci on T2* GRE images?

options.text: Cavernous malformations
Diffuse axonal injury
Neurofibromatosis type I
Cerebral amyloid angiopathy

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解
questions.explanation:
**T2* GRE多發低訊號焦點(microbleeds)之常見病因為cavernous malformations(Zabramski type IV)、diffuse axonal injury、慢性高血壓性腦病變、cerebral amyloid angiopathy；neurofibromatosis type I並非此類典型病因**，故(C)為正解。

(A) 錯：cavernous malformations為T2* GRE多發低訊號焦點常見病因（Zabramski type IV）。
(B) 錯：diffuse axonal injury為常見病因之一。
(C) **對（正解）**：neurofibromatosis type I並非T2* GRE多發低訊號焦點之典型病因。
(D) 錯：cerebral amyloid angiopathy為常見病因之一。

→ [[cerebral-microbleeds]]

questions.questionText: Which type of the cavernous-carotid fistula is the most common?

options.text: Type A
Type B
Type C
Type D

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Neuroradiology: The Requisites, 3rd ed., p.337
questions.explanation:
**Barrow type A（直接型carotid-cavernous fistula）最常見**，故(A)為正解。

(A) **對（正解）**：Type A為直接型（頸內動脈與海綿竇直接相通），最常見類型；主因為外傷或動脈瘤破裂。
(B)(C)(D) 錯：Type B/C/D為間接型（dural AVF），繼發於海綿竇血栓合併再血管化，較少見。

→ [[carotid-cavernous-fistula]]

questions.questionText: Which cranial nerve is more easier being involved in a patient with carotid-cavernous fistula?

options.text: CN III
CN IV
CN VI
CN V

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Diagnostic Cerebral Angiography, 2nd ed. (Anne G. Osborn), p.85
questions.explanation:
**CN VI（外旋神經）因解剖位置最接近內頸動脈，於carotid-cavernous fistula中最常受累**，故(C)為正解。

(A)(B)(D) 錯：CN III、IV、V雖也可能受累（因走行於海綿竇外側壁），但CN VI因游離走行於海綿竇內、緊鄰ICA，最易受影響致複視。
(C) **對（正解）**：CN VI最常受累，可致同側或對側外旋神經麻痺（血流/壓力可傳導至對側海綿竇）。

→ [[carotid-cavernous-fistula]]

questions.questionText: Which is the most common cause of the cavernous-carotid fistula?

options.text: Fibromuscular dysplasia
ICA Aneurym
Trauma
Ehlers-Danlos syndrome

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Neuroradiology: The Requisites, 3rd ed., p.337
questions.explanation:
**外傷(trauma，含手術/血管攝影相關損傷)為直接型(Barrow type A) carotid-cavernous fistula最常見病因**，故(C)為正解。

(A)(D) 錯：Fibromuscular dysplasia、Ehlers-Danlos syndrome皆為直接型病因之一，但非最常見。
(B) 錯：ICA動脈瘤破裂亦為病因之一，但外傷更常見。
(C) **對（正解）**：外傷為最常見病因。

→ [[carotid-cavernous-fistula]]

questions.questionText: 在孩童時期氣管內病灶最常見的原因是？

options.text: Adenoma（腺瘤）
Adenocarcinoma（腺癌）
Subglottic mucocele（聲門下黏液囊腫）
Croup（哮吼）

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Radiology Review Manual, 7th ed.
questions.explanation:
**Croup好發6個月-3歲，為幼童上呼吸道阻塞最常見原因**，故(D)為正解。

(A) 錯：Adenoma罕見於孩童氣管內病灶。
(B) 錯：Adenocarcinoma更罕見於孩童。
(C) 錯：Subglottic mucocele非最常見原因。
(D) **對（正解）**：Croup（急性喉氣管支氣管炎）為幼童上呼吸道阻塞最常見原因。

→ [[croup-steeple-sign]]

questions.questionText: 在plain abdomen的X片上，出現Three bubbles air density最可能的阻塞處是？

options.text: Colon(結腸)
Stomach(胃)
Upper jejunum(上部空腸)
Low small bowel(低位為小腸)

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Radiology Review Manual, 7th ed.
questions.explanation:
**Triple bubble sign為空腸閉鎖(jejunal atresia)之典型X光表現**，為double bubble sign（胃＋近端十二指腸擴張）之延伸，多一顆氣泡代表近端空腸擴張，故(C)為正解。

(A)(B)(D) 錯：非triple bubble sign之對應阻塞部位。
(C) **對（正解）**：Upper jejunum阻塞（空腸閉鎖）致胃＋十二指腸＋近端空腸三顆氣泡擴張。

→ [[neonatal-bowel-atresia-bubble-signs]]

questions.questionText: Air in the portal vein在新生兒時期，常因何疾病引起？

options.text: Bowel distention（腸子擴張）
Leukemia（白血病）
Necrotizing enterocolitis（壞死性腸炎）
Collagen disease（膠原病）

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Radiology Review Manual, 7th ed.
questions.explanation:
**壞死性腸炎(NEC)是早產兒最常見腸胃道疾病，portal venous gas為其重要影像徵象之一**，故(C)為正解。

(A)(B)(D) 錯：非新生兒期portal venous gas之常見病因。
(C) **對（正解）**：NEC影像徵象含腸壁積氣(pneumatosis intestinalis)、portal venous gas、腸擴張伴不對稱分布、腸壁水腫伴thumbprinting；氣腹(pneumoperitoneum)代表重度疾病。

→ [[necrotizing-enterocolitis]]

questions.questionText: 下列器官遭受體外輻射曝露時，何者是以防止確定效應來決定劑量限度？

options.text: 性腺
肺
眼球水晶體
甲狀腺

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；The Essential Physics for Medical Imaging, 3rd ed., p.772
questions.explanation:
**眼球水晶體之劑量限度是以防止白內障（確定效應，閾值約0.5 Gy）為考量而訂定**，故(C)為正解。

(A)(B)(D) 錯：性腺、肺、甲狀腺之劑量限度主要考量隨機效應（致癌/遺傳）而非確定效應。
(C) **對（正解）**：眼球水晶體確定效應閾值約0.5 Gy（白內障形成）；職業曝露之水晶體等價劑量限度不得超過100mSv/5年或50mSv/年。

→ [[radiation-deterministic-effects]]

questions.questionText: 下列那些設備，主管機關已要求實施醫療曝露品質保證計畫？①醫用直線加速器 ②磁振造影儀 ③電腦斷層治療機 ④乳房X光攝影儀 ⑤診斷型透視攝影X光機 ⑥含鈷六十放射性物質之遠隔治療機

options.text: ①③④⑥
①②③⑤
①③④⑤
②③⑤⑥

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；游離輻射防護法
questions.explanation:
**主管機關已要求實施醫療曝露品質保證計畫之設備為①醫用直線加速器、③電腦斷層治療機、④乳房X光攝影儀、⑥含鈷六十放射性物質之遠隔治療機**，故(A)為正解。

(A) **對（正解）**：①③④⑥須實施醫療曝露品質保證計畫（另含含放射性物質之遙控後荷式近接治療設備、電腦刀、加馬刀、X光模擬定位儀）。
(B)(C)(D) 錯：②磁振造影儀、⑤診斷型透視攝影X光機非此規範對象。

→ [[medical-exposure-quality-assurance]]

questions.questionText: X光機產生之特性輻射（characteristic X-rays）光子能量與下列何者最有關？

options.text: X光機管電流
陰極燈絲材質
陽極靶材質
X光機管電壓

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；The Essential Physics for Medical Imaging, 3rd ed., Chapter 6
questions.explanation:
**特性輻射光子能量取決於陽極靶材質元素之核結合能（binding energy）**，每個元素之特性輻射能量固定，故(C)為正解。

(A) 錯：管電流影響X光強度（光子數量），非特性輻射能量。
(B) 錯：陰極燈絲材質與熱電子產生有關，非特性輻射能量。
(C) **對（正解）**：特性輻射能量取決於陽極靶元素之電子結合能（如鎢靶K-shell特性輻射為57.98、59.32 keV；乳房攝影常用鉬靶）。
(D) 錯：管電壓影響X光最高能量與連續輻射(bremsstrahlung)強度，特性輻射能量本身不隨電壓改變（僅電壓需超過該元素結合能才會產生）。

→ [[characteristic-xray-physics]]

questions.questionText: 下列那些為游離輻射的確定效應？①脫毛 ②皮膚紅斑 ③基因突變 ④白內障

options.text: ①②④
②③④
①②③
①③④

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；The Essential Physics for Medical Imaging, 3rd ed., p.772
questions.explanation:
**確定效應為①脫毛、②皮膚紅斑、④白內障；③基因突變屬機率（隨機）效應**，故(A)為正解。

(A) **對（正解）**：脫毛(~2-5Gy)、皮膚紅斑(2Gy)、白內障(0.5Gy)皆有劑量閾值，屬確定效應。
(B)(C)(D) 錯：③基因突變（遺傳效應）為機率效應，無劑量閾值、機率隨劑量增但嚴重度不變，不應與確定效應並列。

→ [[radiation-deterministic-effects]]

questions.questionText: 對告知懷孕之女性輻射工作人員，其腹部表面之等價劑量於剩餘妊娠期間不超過X毫西弗，且攝入體內之放射性核種造成之約定有效劑量不超過Y毫西弗，懷孕期間TLD佩章請佩帶於腹部。其中X與Y分別為多少？
questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；游離輻射防護法、醫療院所輻射安心手冊, p.2
questions.explanation:
**告知懷孕之女性輻射工作人員，剩餘妊娠期間下腹部表面等價劑量不得超過2毫西弗(mSv)，攝入體內放射性核種造成之約定有效劑量不得超過1毫西弗(mSv)**，故(C)為正解（X=2, Y=1）。

(A)(B)(D) 錯：數值組合錯誤。
(C) **對（正解）**：X=2 mSv（腹部表面等價劑量）、Y=1 mSv（攝入放射性核種約定有效劑量）；懷孕期間TLD佩章應佩帶於腹部。

→ [[pregnant-radiation-worker-dose-limits]]

questions.questionText: Impaction of a stone in the gallbladder neck producing inflammation of the adjacent common hepatic duct and intrahepatic bile duct dilation describes which of the following conditions?

options.text: Choledocholithiasis
Charcot triad
Mirizzi syndrome
Carcinoid syndrome

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解（中山）
questions.explanation:
Mirizzi syndrome：膽囊頸或膽囊管結石嵌塞，壓迫/發炎鄰近之總肝管，造成肝內外膽管擴張。
Choledocholithiasis：結石位於膽道系統內造成阻塞。
Charcot triad：黃疸、發燒、右上腹痛，為cholangitis之典型表現。
Carcinoid syndrome：肝臟carcinoid轉移所致之全身症狀，與此題無關。

questions.questionText: Hepatic pseudolesion 描述何者錯誤?

options.text: Focal low attenuation on CT images or low signal intensity on contrast-enhanced MR images adjacent to the falciform ligament is probably related to anomalous venous drainage.
A focal liver lesion located in the posterior part of segment 4 initially suggests focal fatty sparing or focal steatosis.
In patients with steatosis, focal fatty sparing may be seen around the gallbladder fossa in segments 4 and 5.
以上描述皆正確

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解（中山）；Ref: Pitfalls in Liver Imaging. Radiology. 2016 Jan;278(1):34-51.
questions.explanation:
四個選項皆正確，無錯誤選項。
Pseudolesions around the falciform ligament：probably related to anomalous venous drainage (inferior vein of Sappey)，因多數病人於OOP-images無訊號掉落。
Pseudolesion in the posterior part of segment 4（insulin theory）：aberrant right gastric veins（低insulin濃度）直接引流入segment 4造成focal fatty sparing；aberrant duodenopancreatic arcades（高insulin濃度）直接引流入segment 4造成focal fatty steatosis。

questions.questionText: Where is the most common location of visceral artery aneurysm formation?

options.text: Splenic artery (70%)
Hepatic artery (20%)
Superior mesenteric artery (5%)
Gastroduodennal artery (6%)
None of the above

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解（中山）；Ref: Visceral and Renal Artery Aneurysms: A Pictorial Essay on Endovascular Therapy. Radiographics. Nov-Dec 2006;26(6):1687-704
questions.explanation: 內臟動脈瘤最常見部位為脾動脈（70%），其次為肝動脈（20%）、胃十二指腸動脈（6%）、腸繫膜上動脈（5%）。一般而言，內臟動脈瘤治療時機為>2 cm。

questions.questionText: 下列何者不是 inhalational lung injury associated with vaping？

options.text: Diffuse alveolar hemorrhage
Acute eosinophilic pneumonia
Giant cell interstitial pneumonia
以上皆是 inhalational lung injury associated with vaping

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解（中山）；Ref: Radiologic, Pathologic, Clinical, and Physiologic Findings of Electronic Cigarette or Vaping Product Use–associated Lung Injury (EVALI): Evolving Knowledge and Remaining Questions
questions.explanation: Vaping所致肺部傷害之影像型態包括：organizing pneumonia (OP)、diffuse alveolar damage (DAD)、acute eosinophilic pneumonia、diffuse alveolar hemorrhage、hypersensitivity pneumonitis (HP)、exogenous lipoid pneumonia (ELP)，以及giant cell interstitial pneumonia。四個選項所列皆屬之，故答案為D。

questions.questionText: 超音波下若見到何種sign代表extracapsular breast implant rupture？

options.text: Snowstorm sign
Stepladder sign
All of the above
None of the above

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解（中山）；Ref: Insights Imaging. 2011 Dec;2(6):653-670；AJR Am J Roentgenol. 2011 Apr;196(4):W451-60.
questions.explanation: Snowstorm sign代表extracapsular breast implant rupture：游離矽膠droplets與乳房組織混合，為判斷extracapsular rupture最可靠之超音波徵象，類似表現亦可見於矽膠淋巴結病之腋下淋巴結。Stepladder sign則為intracapsular rupture之徵象（塌陷外殼呈階梯狀不連續回音線）。

questions.questionText: 下列何者為非？（關於Pseudoangiomatous Stromal Hyperplasia, PASH）

options.text: Pseudoangiomatous Stromal Hyperplasia (PASH) is a benign proliferative lesion of the breast stroma that is seen more commonly in premenopausal and perimenopausal patients
PASH can appear as a mass or asymmetry but may be occult at mammography
PASH is more often seen as a hypoechoic or heterogeneous circumscribed or irregular mass but may have echogenic components and rarely can be predominantly hyperechoic at US.
PASH is not a premalignant condition or a high-risk marker for malignancy, 4%–10% of biopsy specimens have been reported to have concurrent DCIS or invasive carcinoma in the surrounding tissues.

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解（中山）；Ref: RadioGraphics 2013; 33:419–434
questions.explanation:
官方詳解原始標註「ANS: 4」，並附註「看起來應該都對?」，表達對此答案之自我存疑；詳見vault/concepts/pseudoangiomatous-stromal-hyperplasia.md之[!warning]標記，建議醫師覆核。暫依官方標示答案D為預設值。
PASH好發於停經前及停經前後婦女之乳房間質良性增生性病灶。可表現為腫塊或不對稱，於乳房攝影上可能無法顯示（occult）。超音波多呈低回音或異質性、邊緣清楚或不規則之腫塊，少數可主要呈高回音。PASH並非癌前病變或惡性高風險標記，但4-10%切片檢體於周邊組織可見合併DCIS或侵襲性癌，故仍建議密切臨床與影像追蹤。

questions.questionText: Which kind of Gd agent has higher risk for brain deposition after repeated used?

options.text: Cyclic ionic
Cyclic non-ionic
Linear ionic
Linear non-ionic

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解（中山）；Ref: Korean J Radiol. 2019 Jan; 20(1): 134–147
questions.explanation: Macrocyclic（環狀）製劑因籠狀結構較linear（線狀）穩定；ionic（離子性）製劑因gadolinium與chelate間之靜電作用較non-ionic穩定。故穩定度排序：cyclic ionic最穩定，linear non-ionic最不穩定、腦沉積風險最高。

questions.questionText: Brain MRI findings in hepatic cirrhosis include bilateral hyperintense areas in the globus pallidus and substantia nigra on T1WI. These findings have been attributed to the deposition of?

options.text: Ammonia
Manganese
Gadolinium
Magnesium

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解（中山）；Ref: Differential Diagnosis for Bilateral Abnormalities of the Basal Ganglia and Thalamus RadioGraphics 2011; 31:5–30
questions.explanation: 肝硬化病人因肝臟解毒/排泄功能下降，錳（manganese）經膽道排泄受阻而蓄積於腦部，好發沉積於globus pallidus與substantia nigra，於T1WI呈雙側對稱性高訊號，無需顯影劑即可見。此為肝性腦病變（hepatic encephalopathy）相關之經典影像表現，需與其他造成基底核T1高訊號之病因（如高血鈣、肝門靜脈分流、全靜脈營養）鑑別。

questions.questionText: 下面哪些是2015年ATA發佈high suspicious US features for malignancy？①irregular margins②macrocalcifications③taller than wide shape④spongiform nodule
questions.reference: 官方2020詳解（中山）
questions.explanation: 2015 ATA high suspicion pattern之實心低回音結節須合併：microcalcifications（非macrocalcifications）、irregular margins（infiltrative, microlobulated）、extrathyroidal extension、taller than wide、lymphadenopathy，或rim calcifications with an extrusive soft tissue component。②macrocalcifications應為microcalcifications之誤；④spongiform nodule屬very low suspicion pattern（<3%風險），非high suspicion。故僅①irregular margins與③taller than wide屬high suspicious features，答案為A(1,3)。

questions.questionText: 關於breast fine-needle aspiration cytology (FNAC), 與core needle biopsy, 以下何者為非？

options.text: FNAC 是很可靠、準確度高之檢查，尤其最適用於MR-guided之FNAC.
超音波導引之FNAC, 好處是快、安全，也可以用於水泡之抽出。
當有經驗豐富之cytopathologist判讀時，FNAC準確度高。
FNAC之敏感度低於core needle biopsy. Ultrasound-guided core needle biopsy，以14G切片針取樣，若取一條，準確度大約70%，取三條檢體，準確度有95%。

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解（中山）；Ref: Mitra S, Dey P. Fine-needle aspiration and core biopsy in the diagnosis of breast lesions: A comparison and review of the literature. Cytojournal. 2016 Aug 31;13:18.
questions.explanation: FNAC最適合超音波導引下操作（快、安全，亦可用於水泡抽出），並非最適用於MR-guided；MR-guided較常用於core needle biopsy。FNAC需經驗豐富之cytopathologist判讀方能達高準確度，整體敏感度仍低於core needle biopsy（US-guided 14G core needle biopsy取一條準確度約70%，取三條可達95%）。FNAC於B2/C2病灶（如fibroadenoma）表現優越，但於gray zone病灶（B3/C3、B4/C4）及需明確組織學診斷之病灶（如atypical ductal hyperplasia、in-situ carcinoma、papillary lesions）角色有限。

questions.questionText: About alternative access beyond the femoral arterial approach for transcatheter aortic valve replacement (TAVR), which description is wrong?

options.text: An abnormal location of the left ventricular apex in the thorax (too medial, inferior, or posterior) is not a relative contraindication for a transapical approach.
The factors that may prevent a subclavian approach include a narrowed vessel (<6 mm), severe calcification, and excessive tortuosity.
In the transaortic approach, the ideal aortotomy site is located along the right lateral aspect of the aorta, along the greater curvature of the aorta.
Preexisting pleural calcifications and pericardial calcifications may limit access to the left ventricular apex via thoracotomy.

questions.explanation: 左心室尖端異常位置（過於medial、inferior或posterior）為transapical approach之相對禁忌症，並非「非」相對禁忌症。Transapical approach為最侵襲性之替代路徑，通常保留給股動脈、鎖骨下動脈、transaortic路徑皆有禁忌時採用；限制left ventricular apex經thoracotomy路徑之因素包括：左心室尖端位置異常、既往心肌梗塞造成之心肌變薄或鈣化、肋膜/心包鈣化、左心室射血分率過低(<20%)。Subclavian approach禁忌因素：血管狹窄(<6mm)、嚴重鈣化、過度扭曲。Transaortic approach理想aortotomy位置：主動脈右側緣、沿主動脈greater curvature，距離無名動脈近端1cm，距離主動脈瓣至少5.5cm。

questions.questionText: Concerning hepatic iron overload, which one of the following is incorrect?

options.text: On unenhanced CT, normal liver attenuation ranges from 45 to 65 HU.
Iron overload can result in a homogeneously hyperattenuating liver (75 to 135 HU) because of the high electron density associated with iron atoms.
Iron overload causes T2 and T2* shortening of the liver, which manifests as relative hypointensity on T2W and T2*W images.
Spin-echo sequences (T2 relaxation) are more sensitive to mild iron overload than Gradient-echo sequences (T2* relaxation).

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Abdominal image 1st ed, p628
questions.explanation: 應為Gradient-echo序列(T2*弛豫)對輕度鐵過載較spin-echo序列(T2弛豫)敏感，而非相反。肝內鐵具順磁性，使T2弛豫時間縮短，此加速弛豫程度與鐵含量成正比；需以不同echo time取得訊號才能得到可靠T2測量值，訊號強度對echo time之函數關係可製成T2 parametric map。CT雖易取得，但對hemochromatosis診斷敏感度不佳；陽性病例可見肝密度均勻性增加(75-130 HU)，使門脈與肝靜脈相對於肝實質呈低衰減；dual-energy CT可用於定量鐵沉積。

questions.questionText:
下列器官由頭側至尾側之正常解剖排列順序，何者正確？
甲：left renal vein (L2)
乙：3rd portion of duodenum (L3)
丙：right adrenal gland (T12)
丁：bifurcation of common iliac artery (L4)

options.text: 丙甲乙丁
丙乙甲丁
甲丙乙丁
丙甲丁乙

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Jamie Weir, Imaging Atlas of Human Anatomy 4th edition
questions.explanation: 由頭側至尾側依脊椎節數排列：丙right adrenal gland(T12) → 甲left renal vein(L2) → 乙3rd portion of duodenum(L3) → 丁bifurcation of common iliac artery(L4)。故正確順序為丙甲乙丁(A)。補充：pylorus of stomach位於L1；celiac trunk起於T12；SMA起於L1。

questions.questionText:
The ideal renal entry and puncture site for a simple draining percutaneous nephrostomy includes the following:
A. subcostal, B. intercostal, C. upper pole calyx, D. lower pole calyx, E. posterior calyx, F. anterior calyx, G. Brodel bloodless line, H. Treves bloodless line.

options.text: A+C+E+G
A+D+E+G
A+D+F+H
B+D+E+H
B+C+E+G

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Percutaneous Nephrostomy with Extensions of the Technique: Step by Step. RB. Dyer et al. Radiographics 2002; 22:503-525.
questions.explanation: 理想之經皮腎造廔穿刺進針點為：subcostal(肋骨下，避開肋間神經血管及胸膜)＋lower pole calyx(下極腎盞，較安全)＋posterior calyx(後側腎盞，經Brodel無血管平面進入)＋Brodel bloodless line(腎臟腹側2/3與背側1/3交界處之相對無血管平面)。故正確組合為A+D+E+G(B)。Brodel無血管平面約位於腎臟腹側2/3與背側1/3交界；下側後方腎盞方向朝向此無血管平面。

questions.questionText: Which of the following about CNS pyogenic infection is incorrect?

options.text: In early cerebritis, the infection is focal but not localized.
In late cerebritis, intense and irregular rim enhancement can be depicted on post-contrast T1WI.
On DWI, increased signal intensities is noted in abscess but not in cerebritis.
Presence of dual rim sing on SWI helpful in ditingusing abscess from other ring enhancing lesions.

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Diagnostic imaging: Brain. 3rd edition (Elsevier). P683.
questions.explanation: Cerebritis（早期或晚期）於DWI/ADC上亦可見擴散受限（restricted diffusion），可為patchy分布，並非僅abscess才有訊號增高；故C敘述錯誤。Early cerebritis：病灶局部但邊界不清（focal but not localized），T1等/低訊號、T2/FLAIR高訊號合併血管性水腫、T1顯影後無或輕微不均勻強化、DWI/ADC擴散受限（可呈patchy）。Late cerebritis：漸進性、尤其周邊之強化（邊界不清，與abscess不易區分）、漸進性擴散受限加劇。Dual rim sign於SWI上有助鑑別abscess與其他環狀強化病灶，詳見[[brain-abscess]]。

questions.questionText: Which type of asymmetry identified at mammography has the MOST malignant likelihood of malignancy?

options.text: Focal asymmetry (2%)
Palpable global asymmetry (8%)
Non palpable global asymmetry (~0%)
Developing asymmetry (13-27%)

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: ACR BIRADS Atlas mammography P95 2013
questions.explanation: 四型不對稱惡性風險排序：developing asymmetry（新增/變大，惡性率13-27%，篩檢偵測PPV約13%、診斷性偵測PPV約27%）> palpable global asymmetry（8%）> focal asymmetry（2%）> non-palpable global asymmetry（幾近0%）。惡性風險最高者為developing asymmetry，因其代表「新出現或較前片變大」，此變化本身即為重要警訊，即使超音波無對應病灶亦不應省略切片。詳見[[breast-asymmetry]]。

questions.questionText: 下列有關superficial siderosis下列何者為非？

options.text: 臨床上表現以ataxia或兩側sensorineural hearing loss.
常見的原因是重複性subarachnoid hemorrhages
磁振造影以T2* GRE最易顯示病灶位置。
病灶分布以小腦表面為主，顱神經表面不常見

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解（北醫）；Ref: Diagnostic imaging—Brain I2-3-7-9
questions.explanation: 顱神經表面（尤其CN VIII前庭耳蝸神經）之含鐵血黃素沉積並不罕見，是造成雙側感音性聽力喪失（見於約95%病人）之機轉——CN VIII具長段cisternal course、暴露於蛛網膜下腔且microglial cells對鐵化合物敏感，故顱神經表面沉積並非「不常見」，選項D敘述錯誤。臨床表現：sensorineural hearing loss（雙側、漸進，~95%最常見）、cerebellar ataxia（~90%）、pyramidal signs（~75%）。常見病因為重複性蛛網膜下腔出血。MRI以T2*/SWI（susceptibility-weighted）序列最易顯示腦幹與小腦表面（小腦vermis與folia為偵測細微沉積之佳部位）之低訊號含鐵血黃素緣，長期病例可合併小腦萎縮。

questions.questionText: 下列有關pilocytic astroytoma的敘述何者為是？

options.text: 腫瘤囊狀壁在病理下沒有腫瘤細胞浸潤。
打藥後T1WI影像腫瘤囊狀壁典型不顯影。
在新WHO分類屬第二級。
最常見的位置在小腦葉。

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Diagnostic imaging—Pediatric Neuroradiology I(4):6-9.
questions.explanation: 官方詳解標示答案為A，但頁面本身於答案欄加註「(D?)」表達對是否應為D（最常見位置在小腦）之不確定，因兩者依參考文獻皆為正確敘述：(A)囊狀壁病理上通常無腫瘤細胞浸潤（真正腫瘤成分位於強化之壁結節）；(D)小腦為pilocytic astrocytoma最常見位置(60%)。B錯誤(打藥後壁通常會顯影，非不顯影)；C錯誤(WHO grade I，非第二級)。Pilocytic astrocytoma為兒童最常見原發腦腫瘤，佔小腦星狀細胞瘤70-85%、兒童腦瘤15%；最常見於小腦(60%)，其次視路(25-30%)；幾乎必顯影(~95%)；20%可有鈣化；出血少見。

questions.questionText: Which of the following is a manifestion of AIDS, especially in children?

options.text: Cryptogenic organizing pneumonia
Usual interstitial pneumonia
Despuamative interstitial pneumonia
Lymphoid interstitial pneumonia
Acute interstitial pneumonia

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: The ideal high-yield review of chest imaging! chest Radiology the Essentials. Page 396
questions.explanation: 兒童（<13歲）額外AIDS-defining疾病包括：①多發或反覆性細菌感染、②Lymphoid interstitial pneumonia (LIP)或pulmonary lymphoid hyperplasia complex。LIP是兒童AIDS第二常見之AIDS-defining疾病，好發於CD4+計數相對較高之兒童。

questions.questionText: 女性35歲主述胸痛，胸部X光及CT顯示前縱膈腫瘤（如圖），診斷為何？

options.text: 胸腺瘤(thymoma)
淋巴瘤(lymphoma)
畸胎瘤(teratoma)
胸內甲狀腺腫(intrathoracic goiter)
神經瘤(Neurogenic tumor)

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: The ideal high-yield review of chest imaging! chest Radiology the Essentials. Page105
questions.explanation: 成熟畸胎瘤（mature teratoma）為前縱膈常見腫瘤，典型影像特徵：邊界清楚、以推移而非侵犯鄰近構造；多為囊性(90%)，可單房或多房；囊壁/中隔可顯影；密度多變，可含脂肪、脂肪-液面(specific)、均質軟組織密度；鈣化見於26%，可見牙齒或骨骼(up to 8%)。未成熟畸胎瘤通常呈實質性。

questions.questionText: 一位54歲之男性患者有抽菸史，長期咳嗽且多黃痰已有多年，胸部之電腦斷層攝影檢查顯示右下肺囊狀病灶，請問其最可能之診斷為下列何者？

options.text: 慢性支氣管炎(chronic bronchitis)
肺膿瘍(Lung abscess)
支氣管擴張症(Bronchiectasis)
肺氣腫(Emphysema)

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: The ideal high-yield review of chest imaging! chest Radiology the Essentials. Page272
questions.explanation: CT呈右下肺cystic bronchiectasis：肺組織被支氣管擴張及疤痕組織取代。長期慢性咳嗽多黃痰合併CT囊狀支氣管擴張為典型bronchiectasis表現，詳見[[bronchiectasis]]。

questions.questionText: 關於下圖胸部X-ray診斷蜂窩狀(honeycombing)病灶,下列何者為真?

options.text: 塵肺症(Pneumoconiosis)
肺結核(pulmonary tuberculosis)
慢性間質性肺病(chronic interstitial lung disease)
肺癌(lung cancer)

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: The ideal high-yield review of chest imaging! chest Radiology the Essentials. Page44
questions.explanation: 蜂窩狀(honeycombing)為慢性間質性肺病(chronic interstitial lung disease)之典型影像表現，其病因需視個案而定（看etiology）。塵肺症(pneumoconiosis)、肺結核多favor upper lung分布而非典型honeycombing；肺癌則以mass or nodule為主要表現，非honeycombing。Lymphangitic carcinomatosis之胸部X光可完全正常，異常時最常見為reticulonodular pattern合併interlobular septa增厚（似Kerley B lines），肺與肺葉整體結構仍維持。Coal workers' pneumoconiosis (CWP)與矽肺症、石綿肺、鈹肺症、滑石肺症同屬纖維化型塵肺症，好發上肺，約30%合併鈣化結節，30%可見肺門/縱膈淋巴結腫大，複雜型CWP可見progressive massive fibrosis之大陰影。

questions.questionText: 關於Silhouette Sign在肺葉病灶的運用下列何者為誤?

options.text: RML(右肺中葉) lesion with obliteration of right heart border
RLL(右肺下葉) lesion with obliteration of right heart border
Lingular lobe of left upper lobe(左上肺舌葉) lesion with obliteration of left heart border
RLL(右肺下葉) lesion with obliteration of diaphragm
None of above

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: The ideal high-yield review of chest imaging! chest Radiology the Essentials. Page24
questions.explanation: 右心緣消失對應之病灶為RML（或內側RLL），非單純RLL；RLL病灶典型遮蓋右橫膈緣（選項D正確）而非右心緣。正面胸部X光silhouette sign對應：right paratracheal stripe消失→RUL前段；right heart border消失→RML或medial RLL；right hemidiaphragm消失→RLL；aortic knuckle消失→LUL尖後段；left heart border消失→lingular segments of LUL；left hemidiaphragm/descending aorta消失→LLL。詳見[[silhouette-sign]]。

questions.questionText: 下列何者不會造成air bronchograms現象？

options.text: 肺炎 pneumonia
肺水腫 pulmonary edema
非阻塞性肺塌陷 nonobstructive pulmonary atelectasis
縱隔腔腫瘤 mediastinal tumor
肺腫瘤 lung neoplasm

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: The ideal high-yield review of chest imaging! chest Radiology the Essentials. Page18
questions.explanation: Air bronchogram可見於：pulmonary consolidation（肺炎）、pulmonary edema（尤其alveolar edema）、non-obstructive atelectasis（非阻塞性肺塌陷）、severe interstitial lung disease、neoplasms（bronchioloalveolar carcinoma、pulmonary lymphoma）、pulmonary infarct、pulmonary hemorrhage、normal expiration。縱隔腔腫瘤（mediastinal tumor）本身位於肺實質外，不會造成肺內air bronchogram現象。

questions.questionText: 請問目前在台灣，下列哪兩種contrast medium可以用來intra-thecal injection？

options.text: Optiray 300 / Ultravist 370
Ultravist 300 / Ominpaque 350
Ominpaque 300 / Iopamidol 300
Iopamidol 300 / Optiray 300

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: 2017中華民國放射線醫學會對比劑手冊；2020 ACR manual
questions.explanation: 依2020 ACR對比劑手冊，可用於intrathecal injection之對比劑限「nonionic」且經核准之特定劑型：Omnipaque(iohexol) 180/240/300，以及Isovue-M(iopamidol) 200/300。故正確組合為Omnipaque 300 (iohexol) / Iopamidol 300（C）。Optiray(ioversol)與Ultravist(iopromide)未列於核准可用於intrathecal injection之對比劑清單。

questions.questionText: 關於MR使用的contrast medium，下列敘述何者正確?

options.text: 以含釓對比劑對腎因性全身纖維化(NSF)之風險度來看，對比劑化學結構為環狀者風險較線狀者高。
腎因性全身纖維化之受檢者風險因子包括1.因任何原因接受透析治療，2.慢性腎臟病第四期或第五期（即估計腎絲球過濾率小於<30 mL/min/1.73m2）尚未透析治療者，3.急性腎衰竭(acute kidney insufficiency)
現經多次注射含釓對比劑後在腦部（大腦蒼白球globus pallidus及小腦齒狀核dentate nucleus）可發現T1加權影像信號變高的傾向，但在腎功能正常者不會發生
含釓對比劑在標準劑量(0.5mmol/kg)

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: 2017中華民國放射線醫學會對比劑手冊
questions.explanation: NSF受檢者風險因子正確包含：①因任何原因接受透析治療、②CKD stage 4/5（eGFR<30 mL/min/1.73m2）尚未透析治療者、③急性腎損傷(AKI)。A錯誤：對比劑化學結構為線狀者NSF風險較環狀者高，非相反。C錯誤：釓於腦部蒼白球/齒狀核之T1高訊號沉積在腎功能正常者亦有發現，並非僅腎功能不全者才有。D錯誤：含釓對比劑標準劑量為0.1mmol/kg，非0.5mmol/kg。詳見[[nephrogenic-systemic-fibrosis]]。

questions.questionText: 有關Lisfranc fracture-dislocation下列何者有誤?

options.text: Dislocation of metatarso-cuneiform joint
Associated forced plantar flexion of forefoot on heel
Athletic injury in older population, and Charcot arthropathy in younger diabetic population.
Identify Lisfranc ligament between medial cuneiform and proximal 2nd metatarsal may be the diagnostic clue
None of above

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Diagnostic imaging, Orthopaedics. Amirsys Inc. (2004) Section 6-82,83,84
questions.explanation: 官方詳解標示答案C（選項C年齡族群與病因描述反了——athletic injury好發於較年輕族群、Charcot arthropathy好發於較年長糖尿病族群，與選項所述相反）。官方詳解對選項B亦加註「描述也不很正確?」表達存疑，因受傷機轉原文為軸向負荷合併forefoot過度蹠屈（axial load through hyperplantar flexed forefoot），與選項B「forced plantar flexion of forefoot on heel」用詞略有差異，暫依官方標示C為預設值。Lisfranc ligament連接medial cuneiform與2nd metatarsal base，是唯一跨越第1、2列之骨間韌帶，斷裂為診斷關鍵線索，詳見[[lisfranc-injury]]。好發第三個十年、男性多於女性。

questions.questionText: 有關Scaphoid fracture下列何者為誤?

options.text: Transverse fracture line most commonly seen in middle third of scaphoid
Usually difficult to visualize non-displaced fracture line
Union rate is up to 50% in uncomplicated fracture
Scaphoid non-union mostly associated with fracture at proximal third and vertical oblique fracture at middle third

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Diagnostic imaging, Orthopaedics. Amirsys Inc. (2004) Section 3-38, 39, 40, 41, 46
questions.explanation: 未併發症之scaphoid fracture癒合率應遠高於50%（非unproblematic fracture本身癒合率僅50%這麼低）；非癒合(nonunion)發生率僅5-10%（固定後），意即多數uncomplicated fracture癒合率應達90%以上，故C敘述錯誤。骨折部位分布：waist 65%、proximal third 25%、distal third 10%（較常見於兒童）；男女比2:1，好發第三個十年。Nonunion危險因子：vertical oblique骨折型態、位移>1mm、年齡增長、吸菸；transverse型態較vertical/oblique型態穩定。AVN發生率與骨折距近端極之距離直接相關：proximal 5th AVN率達100%，proximal 3rd AVN率33%。X光初期可能為陰性(27%)，需於14-21天後複查。

questions.questionText: According to the 2018 AHA/ASA Guidelines for Management of Acute Ischemic Stroke, for acute large vessel occlusion stroke case of anterior circulation, with the help of MR-DWI or perfusion imaging, it is possible to extend the Intra-arterial thrombectomy (IAT) treatment window up to How Long after symptom onset?

options.text: 6 hours
16~24 hours
72 hours
120 hours

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: 2018 Guidelines for the Early Management of Patients With Acute Ischemic Stroke: A Guideline for Healthcare Professionals From the American Heart Association/American Stroke Association. Stroke. 2018;49:e46–e99
questions.explanation: 2018 AHA/ASA指引：advanced imaging（CT perfusion或MRI/MR perfusion）可將前循環大血管阻塞中風之機械取栓治療窗延長至最後正常時間後6-24小時，用於篩選具可挽救腦組織之病人（DAWN試驗：good outcome 49% vs 13%；DEFUSE 3試驗：good outcome 45% vs 17%），選項B(16-24小時)為最接近之區間。詳見[[ia-thrombectomy-stroke-window]]。

questions.questionText: What is the scope of benefits (給付標準) of IA thrombectomy in National Health Insurance of Taiwan(全民健保)？

options.text: Anterior circulation, onset within 8 hours.
Posterior circulation, onset within 24 hours.
Large vessel occlusion, including internal carotid artery、M1, M2 segment of middle cerebral artery, anterior cerebral artery, basilar and vertebral arteries.
NIHSS ≧8 and lower than ≦30
All of the above

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: 全民健保，衛生福利部中央健康保險署醫療給付項目及支付標準
questions.explanation: 台灣全民健保顱內血管支架取栓裝置給付需同時符合：①前循環發作內8小時、後循環發作後24小時內；②NIH Stroke Scale評分≧8 and ≦30；③影像診斷為顱內大動脈阻塞，包括內頸動脈、大腦中動脈第1及第2段、大腦前動脈、基底動脈和脊椎動脈。四個選項皆為正確之給付條件組成部分，故答案為E(all of the above)。詳見[[ia-thrombectomy-stroke-window]]。

questions.questionText: Which molecular subtype of Medulloblastoma has lowest risk and best prognosis?

options.text: WNT group
SHH group
Group 3
Group 4

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: The 2016 World Health Organization Classification of Tumors of the Central Nervous System: a summary. Acta Neuropathol (2016) 131:803–820.
questions.explanation: 2016 WHO CNS分類將髓母細胞瘤分四個分子亞型：WNT group（頻率~10%，好發較大兒童，CTNNB1突變/monosomy 6，存活率非常好且不受p53狀態影響，好發位置CP angle，轉移少見）；SHH group（~30%，好發嬰兒與較大兒童/青少年，存活中等且依p53狀態而異，好發小腦半球）；Group 3（~20%，好發幼童，MYC/OTX2擴增，存活最差，好發中線/第四腦室，轉移常見）；Group 4（~40%，各年齡層皆可見，i17q/MYCN/OTX2異常，存活中等，好發中線/第四腦室，轉移常見）。WNT group具最低風險與最佳預後。

questions.questionText: A 1-month-old girl is brought to her pediatrician for a unilateral neck mass associated with torticollis. The mass was not present at birth. The patient's mother reports that forceps were used during the delivery. An ultrasound of the mass shows a heterogeneous solid lesion in the midportion of the sternocleidomastoid muscle. What is the most likely diagnosis?

options.text: Fibromatosis colli
Rhabdomyosarcoma
Lymphatic malformation
Infantile hemangioma

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Wojcicki KM et al: Fibromatosis colli spuriously presenting as a retropharyngeal mass on cervical spine radiographs. Intern Emerg Med. 11(2):277-9, 2015
questions.explanation: Fibromatosis colli為罕見之嬰兒纖維瘤病，發生於胸鎖乳突肌(SCM)內。臨床表現常為斜頸(torticollis)，最常與生產創傷（如forceps delivery）或胎位不正（如breech presentation）有關；可能略好發於男性。屬自限性疾病，通常於4-8個月內自行緩解，僅需物理治療。超音波典型呈SCM肌肉中段之異質性實質病灶。

questions.questionText: A newborn with microcephaly has a "blueberry muffin" rash. Head ultrasound shows lateral ventriculomegaly with numerous periventricular calcifications, abnormal sulcation, and cerebellar hypoplasia. What is the most likely diagnosis?

options.text: Dandy-Walker malformation
Tuberous sclerosis
TORCH (toxoplasmosis, other agents, rubella, cytomegalovirus, herpes simplex) infection
Alobar holoprosencephaly

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Clinical features and neuroimaging (CT and MRI) findings in presumed Zika virus related congenital infection and microcephaly: retrospective case series study. BMJ. 353:i3182, 2016
questions.explanation: Blueberry muffin syndrome（藍莓鬆餅疹）指皮膚多發性隆起、典型藍紫色病灶，因真皮層髓外造血所致，病因包括先天性感染（CMV、rubella）、血液疾病、惡性腫瘤（neuroblastoma、AML）、先天性血管疾病。合併microcephaly、腦室擴大、periventricular calcification、異常腦溝形成、小腦發育不全，符合TORCH（toxoplasmosis、other agents、rubella、CMV、herpes simplex）先天性感染之典型神經影像表現。不同病原體鈣化位置略有差異：CMV為thick chunky periventricular calcification；toxoplasmosis為nodular periventricular/cortical calcification；rubella為basal ganglia/periventricular；Zika則為皮質-皮質下白質交界處點狀鈣化，且microcephaly/micrencephaly程度通常較其他先天感染更嚴重。

questions.questionText: Which data is the first randomized controlled trial to report a significant reduction in disease-specific lung cancer mortality due to screening?

options.text: NELSON (Dutch-Belgian Randomized Lung Cancer Screening Trial)
DLCST (Danish Lung Cancer Screening Trial)
NLST (National Lung Screening Trial)
UKLS (U.K. Lung Cancer Screening Trial)

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: RadioGraphics 2015; 35:1893–1908
questions.explanation: NLST（National Lung Screening Trial）於2011年首度公布結果，是第一個報告低劑量CT肺癌篩檢可顯著降低肺癌特異性死亡率之隨機對照試驗，成為2013年USPSTF公共衛生建議之實證基礎。詳見[[lung-cancer-screening-trials]]。

questions.questionText: How many percentage of relative reduction in the rate of death due to lung cancer after three rounds of low-dose CT screening in NLST (National Lung Screening Trial)?
questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: RadioGraphics 2015; 35:1893–1908
questions.explanation: NLST於55-74歲高風險族群53,454人進行篩檢（低劑量螺旋CT或胸部X光基準攝影加兩次年度追蹤），三輪低劑量CT篩檢使肺癌死亡率相對降低20%。詳見[[lung-cancer-screening-trials]]。

questions.questionText: 根據Diagnostic criteria for idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis: a Fleischner Society White Paper (2018)，下列描述何者錯誤?

options.text: Typical UIP CT pattern的distribution為basal predominant (occasionally diffuse)和subpleural predominant。
Probable UIP CT pattern需有honeycombing。
CT pattern indeterminate for UIP的distribution為variable或diffuse。
CT features most consistent with non-IPF diagnosis的表現包含predominant consolidation。

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Lancet Respir Med 2018; 6: 138–53
questions.explanation: 依2018 Fleischner Society診斷分類，Probable UIP CT pattern之定義為「reticular pattern with peripheral traction bronchiectasis/bronchiolectasis，honeycombing需為缺無（absent）」，而非「需有honeycombing」——有honeycombing者應歸類為Typical UIP，非Probable UIP。詳見[[ipf]]。

questions.questionText: Which one of following is not a radiologic feature of consolidation?

options.text: Acinar shadows
Air bronchogram
Displaced fissures
Loss of air in acina

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Primer, 6th ed. P 60
questions.explanation: Displaced fissures（葉裂移位）為atelectasis（肺塌陷）之典型影像特徵，非consolidation（肺實變）之特徵。肺實變典型特徵包括：acinar shadows（腺泡狀陰影）、air bronchogram（支氣管充氣徵）、loss of air in acina（腺泡內空氣被取代）。

questions.questionText: Which of the following would be the LEAST common cause of an esophageal stricture?

options.text: Barrett esophagus
Eosinophilic esophagitis
Drug-induced esophagitis
Reflux esophagitis

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Radprimer
questions.explanation: Eosinophilic esophagitis亦可造成食道狹窄，但需長期病程（超過20年約71%會發生），相對於Barrett esophagus、drug-induced esophagitis、reflux esophagitis，是食道狹窄中相對最少見之病因。

questions.questionText: Rectal cancer differs from colon carcinoma in all of these ways EXCEPT?

options.text: Pathways of spread
Extent of preoperative imaging evaluation
Likelihood of local recurrence
Histopathology

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Radprimer
questions.explanation: 直腸癌與結腸癌之組織病理學（histopathology）皆為adenocarcinoma，兩者並無不同；但擴散途徑（因直腸無漿膜層、鄰近mesorectal fascia）、術前影像評估範圍（直腸癌需MRI評估mesorectal fascia/T分期）、局部復發率（直腸癌因骨盆腔空間有限、鄰近構造多，局部復發率較結腸癌高）皆與結腸癌不同。詳見[[rectal-cancer-mri]]。

questions.questionText: The least common etiology or type of diverticulum in the esophagus/hypopharynx is which of the following?

options.text: Killian-Jamieson diverticulum
Zenker diverticulum
Traction diverticulum
Epiphrenic diverticulum

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Radprimer
questions.explanation: Killian-Jamieson diverticulum相對於Zenker diverticulum較少見（infrequently）。上食道憩室：Zenker diverticulum（pulsion，起源於下咽後壁正中，near pharyngoesophageal junction）與Killian-Jamieson diverticulum（pulsion，位於cricopharyngeus肌下方，前外側，多為左側，少數雙側）。中段食道憩室：traction diverticula（true diverticula，繼發於縱膈疤痕/纖維化/發炎如結核性淋巴結炎）較pulsion diverticula常見。下段食道憩室：epiphrenic diverticula（pulsion，位於下食道括約肌上方，多見右後外側壁）。Traction與epiphrenic diverticula多無症狀；症狀通常於憩室>5cm時出現（多為pulsion型），包含吸入、逆流、食道腔壓迫。

questions.questionText: All of the following may cause or simulate a hypervascular mass within the pancreas. Which is the MOST common etiology for such a lesion within the pancreatic body?

options.text: Pancreatic neuroendocrine tumor
Accessory spleen
Pancreatic serous cystadenoma
Metastases to the pancreas

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Radprimer
questions.explanation: 胰臟體部富血管腫塊，最常見之病因為pancreatic neuroendocrine tumor（PNET）。Accessory spleen（副脾）好發於胰尾（非胰體），且與脾臟訊號/顯影行為同步可資鑑別；serous cystadenoma多呈微囊蜂窩狀伴中央瘢痕；胰臟轉移癌相對少見。詳見[[pancreatic-neuroendocrine-tumors]]。

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT correct about theca lutein cyst?

options.text: Related to gestational trophoblastic disease
Typically bilateral involvement
Multiple cysts
Malignant potential

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Hricak, H. Diagnostic Imaging: Gynecology. Salt Lake City, Utah: Amirsys; 2007. p 7-16~7-18.
questions.explanation: Theca lutein cyst（黃素化卵泡膜細胞囊腫，又稱hyperreactio luteinalis）為functional（良性）卵巢囊腫，不具惡性潛能。典型多發（multiple）且雙側（bilateral），與循環中過量促性腺激素（如beta-hCG）有關，與妊娠滋養層疾病（gestational trophoblastic disease）高度相關；其他相關病況包括多胎妊娠、多囊性卵巢症候群(PCOS)、糖尿病、clomiphene使用、排卵誘導。

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT a typical image finding of adnexal torsion?

options.text: Hemorrhage
Uterine deviation towards torsed ovary
"Twisted vascular pedicle" sign
More commonly related to a malignant ovarian tumor

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Hricak, H. Diagnostic Imaging: Gynecology. Salt Lake City, Utah: Amirsys; 2007. p 7-176~7-178.
questions.explanation: 卵巢/附件扭轉大多與良性病灶（most commonly dermoid cysts或paraovarian cysts）相關，而非惡性卵巢腫瘤；5-10cm大小之腫塊風險最高。扭轉主要特徵為卵巢腫大（因靜脈/淋巴回流受阻、水腫、出血），次要徵象包括骨盆腔游離液體、underlying ovarian lesion、血流減少或消失、及twisted dilated tubular structure對應vascular pedicle（twisted vascular pedicle sign）。附件扭轉常見單側，右側略多見(3:2)。

questions.questionText: Benign prostatic hypertrophy involves which portion of the prostate gland?

options.text: Peripheral zone
Anterior fibromuscular stroma
Transition zone
Central zone

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Radprimer
questions.explanation: 良性前列腺肥大（BPH）好發於transition zone（移行區）。前列腺分區：central zone（中央區）、fibromuscular zone（纖維肌肉區）、transitional zone（移行區）、peripheral zone（周邊區）、periurethral gland region（尿道周圍腺體區）。前列腺癌則好發於peripheral zone。

questions.questionText: A 79-year-old male presents with an ureteroenteric anastomotic stricture of his urinary diversion after radical cystectomy for what ultimately was shown to be a confined tumor. Ureteroenteric anastomotic strictures are most commonly due to which of the following?

options.text: Radiation treatment
Recurrent tumor
Improperly fashioned anastomosis
Ureteral ischemia

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Radprimer
questions.explanation: 以Indiana pouch進行continent diversion後，約8%病人會發生輸尿管狹窄，尤其ureteroenteric anastomotic strictures。術後ureteroenteric anastomotic stricture通常於術後約1年出現，最常見原因為缺血所致之良性狹窄（benign strictures secondary to ischemia），左側輸尿管受累較右側常見。惡性狹窄（因腫瘤復發）亦可能發生，但相對少見。

questions.questionText: Which of the following ovarian lesions is typically hypointense (relative to skeletal muscles) at T2W MR imaging?

options.text: Krukenberg tumor
Yolk sac tumor
Abscess
Subacute hemorrhage

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Radprimer
questions.explanation: T2低訊號（相對於骨骼肌）之卵巢病灶包括：endometrioma、cystic adenomyosis、hematosalpinx、leiomyoma、fibroma、fibrothecoma、cystadenofibroma、struma ovarii。T2高訊號病灶則包括：hemorrhagic cyst、malignant transformation of endometrioma、mucinous cystic neoplasm、Krukenberg tumor。本題答案D「subacute hemorrhage」須留意：早期subacute（intracellular methemoglobin，3-7天）T1高、T2低；但late subacute（extracellular methemoglobin，1週至數月）則T1與T2皆呈高訊號，官方詳解對此已加註提醒。

questions.questionText: What are the characteristics of a typical transitional zone prostate cancer?

options.text: Well-defined, low T2 signal intensity, early enhancement, and low apparent diffusion coefficient (ADC).
Ill-defined, low T2 signal intensity, late enhancement, and low ADC.
Ill-defined, low T2 signal intensity, early enhancement, and low ADC.
Well-defined, low T2 signal intensity, early enhancement, and high ADC.

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Multiparametric MR Imaging of the Prostate after Treatment of Prostate Cancer. Patel P, Mathew MS, Trilisky I, Oto A. Radiographics 2018 Mar-Apr;38(2):437-449.
questions.explanation: 移行區前列腺癌（transition zone cancer）於T2WI呈均質低訊號（「erased charcoal」sign），邊界不清（ill-defined margins）、缺乏包膜（lack of capsule）、呈lenticular形狀，可合併或不合併anterior fibromuscular stroma侵犯，並呈低ADC值、早期顯影(early enhancement)。詳見[[prostate-cancer-mri-treatment]]。

questions.questionText: Which of the following best describes the Epstein inclusion criteria for active surveillance?

options.text: Gleason score less than or equal to 7, two or fewer cores with cancer, and less than or equal to 33% cancer involvement of any core.
Gleason score less than or equal to 6, three or fewer cores with cancer, and less than or equal to 50% cancer involvement of any core.
Gleason score less than or equal to 7, three or fewer cores with cancer, and less than or equal to 33% cancer involvement of any core.
Gleason score less than or equal to 6, two or fewer cores with cancer, and less than or equal to 50% cancer involvement of any core.

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Multiparametric MR Imaging of the Prostate after Treatment of Prostate Cancer. Patel P, Mathew MS, Trilisky I, Oto A. Radiographics 2018 Mar-Apr;38(2):437-449.
questions.explanation: Epstein inclusion criteria：Gleason score ≤6、two or fewer cores with cancer、PSA density ≤0.15 ng/mL、cancer involvement ≤50% of any core，符合者可納入active surveillance。與Johns Hopkins、Sunnybrook、PRIAS等其他主動監測納入標準（各系統於clinical stage/PSA level/PSA density/Gleason score/cancer amount之閾值略有不同）併列比較。詳見[[prostate-cancer-mri-treatment]]。

questions.questionText: What is the most common site of recurrence after radical prostatectomy?

options.text: Lymph nodes.
Incision/port site.
Vesicourethral anastomosis.
Prostatic bed.

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Multiparametric MR Imaging of the Prostate after Treatment of Prostate Cancer. Patel P, Mathew MS, Trilisky I, Oto A. Radiographics 2018 Mar-Apr;38(2):437-449.
questions.explanation: 根治性前列腺切除術後最常見局部復發部位為vesicourethral anastomosis（膀胱尿道吻合處），典型表現為環繞膀胱及/或membranous urethra之顯影軟組織結節，於T1WI與肌肉等訊號、T2WI較肌肉略高訊號。DCE與T2WI對偵測吻合處及anterolateral手術邊緣、精囊內、膀胱與直腸間之復發病灶最有幫助。詳見[[prostate-cancer-mri-treatment]]。

questions.questionText: In evaluation of DDH, the tangent line drawn across the lowest points of both iliac wings is called:

options.text: Hilgenreiner line
X line
Perkins line
Shenton line

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Radiography, CT, and MRI of Hip and Lower Limb Disorders in Children and Adolescents. Radiographics 39(4):1232-1232
questions.explanation: Hilgenreiner line：連接雙側髂骨翼最低點之切線（tangent line），為評估DDH（developmental dysplasia of the hip）之基準水平線。Perkins line：通過髖臼外側緣，垂直於Hilgenreiner line之垂直線；正常股骨頭應位於Perkins line內側、Hilgenreiner line下方。Shenton line：沿股骨頸內側緣與恥骨上支下緣連成之弧線，正常應連續平滑，dysplastic hip則呈中斷（broken）。Acetabular roof angle正常應<30°，dysplastic hip則>30°。

questions.questionText: 下列有關 acute vertebrobasilar occlusion 的取栓治療，何者為錯？

options.text: 屬於 AHA/ASA class1/level A 的建議 (2019)。
DWI MRI 可能可以協助評估合適病人。
在本地常因源於 intracranial atherosclerotic disease (ICAD)。
不應延誤靜脈溶栓治療。

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Guidelines for the Early Management of Patients With Acute Ischemic Stroke: 2019 Update to the 2018 Guidelines for the Early Management of Acute Ischemic Stroke: A Guideline for Healthcare Professionals From the American Heart Association/American Stroke Association. Stroke. 2019;50:e344–e418
questions.explanation: 2019 AHA/ASA更新中，對於basilar/vertebral artery occlusion之機械取栓建議為Class IIb（弱）、Level of Evidence C-LD（有限資料），並非Class I/Level A，故(A)為錯。急性basilar artery occlusion可能源於thromboembolism、atherosclerosis(ICAD於亞洲人族群常見)或intracranial dissection延伸；DWI MRI可協助評估適合治療之病人；不應因評估延誤靜脈溶栓治療。

questions.questionText: 下列那個構造不屬於 supraglottis？

options.text: False cord
Arytenoid
Epiglottis
Postcricoid area

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Larynx and hypopharynx. Radiol Clin N Am. 1998; 36: 891-9205
questions.explanation: 喉部三分區(supraglottis/glottis/subglottis)中，supraglottis包含epiglottis、false cord(ventricular fold)、arytenoid cartilage、aryepiglottic fold等結構。Postcricoid area屬於下咽(hypopharynx)之次分區（與piriform fossae、posterior pharyngeal wall並列），非supraglottis之一部分，故(D)為不屬於。

questions.questionText: For bone changes in glomus jugulare paraganglioma, which one of the following is most likely?

options.text: Permeative, destructive
Sharply-marginated, enlarged jugular fossa.
Sclerotic, hyperostosis
None of above

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Diagnostic Imaging: Head and neck, I-3-26
questions.explanation: Glomus jugulare paraganglioma之CT骨窗典型呈permeative, destructive（蟲蝕狀侵蝕性）骨破壞，隨腫瘤增大侵蝕jugular spine並延伸入中耳及顳下窩。相對地，jugular foramen schwannoma呈sharply-marginated smooth骨質擴大(B)，jugular foramen meningioma呈sclerotic/hyperostosis(C)。

questions.questionText: For bone changes in jugular foramen schwannoma, which one of the following is most likely?

options.text: Permeative, destructive
Sharply-marginated, enlarged jugular fossa.
Sclerotic, hyperostosis
None of above

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Diagnostic Imaging: Head and neck. I-3-30
questions.explanation: Jugular foramen schwannoma之骨質變化特徵為sharply-marginated smooth（邊緣具皮質之扇貝狀）骨質擴大，內部通常無flow void，血管攝影非高度富血管，無salt-and-pepper徵象，Indium-111 octreotide呈陰性。與glomus jugulare paraganglioma之permeative destructive(A)、meningioma之sclerotic/hyperostosis(C)形成對比，骨緣型態為主要鑑別點。

questions.questionText: For bone changes in jugular foramen meningioma, which one of the following is most likely?

options.text: Permeative, destructive
