Sharply-marginated, enlarged jugular fossa.
Sclerotic, hyperostosis
None of above

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Diagnostic Imaging: Head and neck, I-3 37
questions.explanation: Jugular foramen meningioma典型呈sclerotic骨質變化，伴hyperostosis（約5%），為meningioma緊貼顱底骨質時之常見表現，可合併鈣化與板障浸潤。與glomus jugulare paraganglioma之permeative destructive(A)、schwannoma之sharply-marginated smooth擴大(B)不同。

questions.questionText: 下列有關於利用心血管影像 (cardiovascular imaging)檢查小朋友(children)先天性心臟病(congenital heart diseases)的描述何者 錯誤？

options.text: 最新(2019)的心臟電腦斷層掃描攝影(cardiac computed tomography)，可以利用X光球管電壓電流的調控(X-ray tube current & voltage modulation)，可大幅降低輻射劑量(radiation dose)，甚至小於一個毫西弗(mSv)。

目前臨床上使用的非侵襲性(non-invasive)心血管影像設備中（包括心臟超音波echocardiography、電腦斷層CT、磁振掃描MRI、核子醫學掃描nuclear medicine scan），就以電腦斷層掃描攝影(computed tomography)，能夠提供最高解析度(highest spatial resolution)的影像，適合用來找尋其他影像檢查不容易探查的微小構造，例如小朋友的冠狀動脈異常。
心臟磁振掃描攝影(cardiac MRI)可以提供心臟各個腔室和血管，有關血行動力學(hemodynamics)的測量。
心臟磁振掃描攝影(cardiac MRI)對於心臟肌肉(myocardium)的組織特性(tissue contrast)及接受顯影劑增強(contrast enhancement)的變化情形，優於心臟電腦斷層(cardiac CT)。
以上的四項描述都沒有錯誤，都是正確的。

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Multimodality Appropriate Use Criteria for Noninvasive Cardiac Imaging: Expert Consensus of the Asian Society of Cardiovascular Imaging. Korean J Radiol. 2017 Nov-Dec;18(6):871-880.
questions.explanation: 四項描述皆正確：(A)2019年起心臟CT可利用X光管電壓/電流調控大幅降低輻射劑量甚至<1mSv；(B)CT於四種非侵襲性心血管影像中提供最高空間解析度，適合找尋冠狀動脈異常等微小構造；(C)cardiac MRI可測量心臟腔室/血管之血行動力學；(D)cardiac MRI於心肌組織特性與顯影劑增強變化判讀優於cardiac CT。

questions.questionText: 下列有關利用心臟影像檢查（cardiac CT & cardiac MRI）診斷「右心室雙出口」(double outlet of right ventricle; DORV)的先天性心臟病 (congenital heart disease)要點中，下列何者 錯誤？

options.text: 按照英國派Anderson的定義，只要有其中一條大血管（主動脈或肺動脈）100%加上另外一條大血管（肺動脈或主動脈）超過50%的動脈瓣膜下(subvalvular)面積，由右心室的出來，便能診斷「右心室雙出口」(DORV)。
按照美國派Van Praagh的定義，不管大動脈（主動脈或肺動脈）動脈瓣膜下(subvalvular)有多少面積是源出於右心室，但是這兩個大動脈動脈瓣(great arterial valve)和二尖瓣(mitral valve)中間務必要有肌肉層阻擋(block)住這兩個瓣膜之間「纖維的連結」(fibrous continuity)，才能夠診斷「右心室雙出口」。
在「右心室雙出口」的個案中，正確診斷出心室中膈缺損(ventricular septal defect)的位置是靠近哪一個大動脈下面，對未來開刀術式的選擇相當重要。
典型的「右心室雙出口」，兩條大動脈呈現併行(parallel arrangement)的排列。
以上的四項描述都沒有錯誤，都是正確的。

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: How should we diagnose and differentiate hearts with double-outlet right ventricle? Cardiol Young. 2017 Jan;27(1):1-15.
questions.explanation: 四項描述皆正確：(A)Anderson定義以動脈瓣膜下面積百分比(一條100%+另一條>50%)診斷DORV；(B)Van Praagh定義要求兩大動脈瓣與二尖瓣間有肌肉層阻隔(無fibrous continuity)；(C)VSD相對大動脈位置(subaortic/subpulmonary/doubly committed/non-committed)決定手術術式選擇；(D)典型DORV兩條大動脈呈parallel arrangement排列。

questions.questionText: 下列有關「成人期先天性心臟病」(adult congenital heart disease; ACHD)的描述何者 錯誤？

options.text: 在公共衛生普及並且醫療科技相對進步的國家，「成人期先天性心臟病」(ACHD)的比例比較高，2019年數據顯示，美國先天性心臟病門診中，已經有超過一半的個案，屬於成人。
「成人期先天性心臟病」需要進一步接受心血管相關影像檢查(cardiac CT and/or cardiac MRI)的疾病種類分佈，和兒童期的先天性心臟病不一樣，佔最大比例的疾病別是原有的先天性心臟病，在手術開刀之後，慢性後期併發症，需要進一步處置。
這些「成人期先天性心臟病」，也可能會有肺部和胸腔的問題或者是冠狀動脈的疾病，因而接受心血管或者是胸腔影像的掃描檢查，大大的增加放射診斷科醫師需診斷撰打此類報告的機會。

若在沒有全面普及性兒童篩檢的情境下，某些特殊的先天性心臟病，有可能因為在孩童時期沒有明顯症狀，一直到了成人期才被發現，最典型的例子就是「部分的肺靜脈回流異常(partial anomalous pulmonary venous return)」，例如右上側肺靜脈(right upper pulmonary vein)異常回流注入上腔靜脈(superior vena cava)，孩童時期一直沒被發現，時間久之後，慢慢的造成了肺動脈高壓(pulmonary hypertension)，出現了症狀才來就醫。
以上的四項描述都沒有錯誤，都是正確的。

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: 2018 AHA/ACC Guideline for the Management of Adults With Congenital Heart Disease: A Report of the American College of Cardiology/American Heart Association Task Force on Clinical Practice Guidelines. Circulation. 2019 Apr 2;139(14):e698-e800.
questions.explanation: 四項描述皆正確：(A)2019年美國先天性心臟病門診已逾半數個案為成人；(B)ACHD影像疾病分佈以術後慢性後期併發症為主，與兒童期不同；(C)ACHD常合併肺部/胸腔/冠狀動脈疾病，增加放射科醫師判讀報告機會；(D)部分肺靜脈回流異常等疾病可能延遲至成人期因肺動脈高壓症狀才被發現。

questions.questionText: 下面有關「環形氣管-左肺動脈吊索症候群」(ring-sling syndrome)的描述何者 錯誤？

options.text: 氣管狹窄(tracheal stenosis)的涵蓋範圍(involved range)，經常遠遠超過左肺動脈吊索(left pulmonary artery sling)繞過氣管所壓迫的範圍。
從胚胎發育學(embryogenesis)的角度來看，氣管發育不良(tracheal underdevelopment)是「因」，而左肺動脈吊索(left pulmonary artery sling)是「果」。
如果只是將吊索的左肺動脈重新縫合(re-implantation)到主肺動脈幹(pulmonary trunk)，並沒辦法解決內在的(intrinsic)氣管狹窄(tracheal stenosis)的問題。
這些發育不良(underdeveloped)相對狹窄的氣管，比起正常人而言反而「比較長」(longer)，因而有利於外科醫師進行「滑動氣管整形術」(sliding tracheoplasty)，用以改善氣管的狹窄。
以上的四項描述都沒有錯誤，都是正確的。

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Left pulmonary artery sling complex: computed tomography and hypothesis of embryogenesis. Ann Thorac Surg. 2007 Nov;84(5):1645-50.；Excessive Tracheal Length in Patients With Congenital Tracheal Stenosis. Ann Thorac Surg. 2019 Jul;108(1):138-145.
questions.explanation: 四項描述皆正確：(A)氣管狹窄範圍常超過吊索壓迫範圍；(B)氣管發育不良為因、左肺動脈吊索為果；(C)單純吊索復位無法解決內在性氣管狹窄；(D)發育不良氣管反而較長、carina角度較寬，有利於滑動氣管整形術，兼可恢復氣管支氣管形態。

questions.questionText: Which one of the followings is the most appropriate?

options.text: Regardless of the etiology of UTI, the goal of management is preservation of curative reconstruction.
In most cases, radiologic examinations of urinary tracts cannot be delayed after a period of observation - with or without urinary antibiotic prophylaxis.
The majority of antenatally detected hydronephrosis is obstructive but either resolves or stabilizes.
Voiding cystourethrography is the modality of choice to evaluate patients with urinary tract infection.

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Pediatric Nephrology 2013;28(9):1757-1761；Am J Dis Child 1992;146:1181-1184
questions.explanation: 大多數情況下，泌尿道之影像學檢查不能於觀察期後無限期延後，無論是否使用抗生素預防。(A)目標應為preservation of renal function而非curative reconstruction；(C)多數產前腎水腫為non-obstructive而非obstructive；(D)VCUG並非評估所有UTI病人之首選常規工具，僅限特定指徵者才安排。

questions.questionText: 以超音波監測執行射頻消融(radiofrequency ablation)時，其訊號(echogenecity)會有甚麼改變？

options.text: 訊號變低(hypo-echoic change)
訊號變高(hyper-echoic change)
訊號不變(iso-echoic change)
以上皆非

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Image-guided tumor ablation: emerging technologies and future directions. Semin Intervent Radiol. 2010 Sep;27(3):302-13.
questions.explanation: 超音波監測RFA時，消融區訊號呈hyperechoic change，反映組織加熱產生之微氣泡與汽化效應，為術中即時監測消融範圍之關鍵徵象。

questions.questionText:
以超音波顯影劑觀察肝硬化病人的肝結節在晚期(delayed phase)時，以下何者組合正確？
(1) 分化不良結節(dysplatic nodule)-等迴聲(iso-echoic)
(2) 肝細胞癌(hepatocellular carcinoma)-低迴聲(hypo-echoic)
(3) 膽管癌(cholangiocarcinoma)-低迴聲(hypo-echoic)
(4) 血管瘤(hemangioma)-快速填入(flash-filling)
questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Integration of Contrast-enhanced US into a Multimodality Approach to Imaging of Nodules in a Cirrhotic Liver: How I Do It. Radiology. 2017 Feb;282(2):317-331.
questions.explanation: 四項組合皆正確：分化不良結節晚期等迴聲；HCC晚期低迴聲(晚而弱之洗出)；膽管癌晚期低迴聲(快速洗出)；血管瘤動脈期周邊結節狀強化或flash-filling，晚期與血池等回音無洗出。

questions.questionText: 以下各種超音波彈性影像何者不具有B mode的功能？

options.text: Transient elastography
Acoustic radiation force impulse excitation
Shear wave imaging
Strain imaging

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: What we need to know when performing and interpreting US elastography. Clin Mol Hepatol. 2016 Sep;22(3):406-414.
questions.explanation: Transient elastography(TE/FibroScan)最常依賴體外探頭產生之機械脈衝進行量測，不含B mode影像功能；ARFI、shear wave imaging、strain imaging皆整合於具B mode之診斷超音波系統。

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT a typical ultrasound finding of hepatic hemangioma?

options.text: Hyperechoic mass
Hypoechoic in a fatty liver
Calcification is rare
Color Doppler flow in center of lesion

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Ahuja, A. Diagnostic Imaging: Ultrasound. Salt Lake City, Utah: Amirsys; 2007. 1-78~1-79.
questions.explanation: 血管瘤中央典型為乏血流(慢流)，非中央可見血流訊號，故(D)為非典型。高回音腫塊、脂肪肝背景下呈低回音、鈣化罕見皆為典型表現。

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT a typical ultrasound finding of hepatocellular carcinoma?

options.text: May be hyperechoic
May be surrounded by a thin hyperechoic halo
Calcification is rare
May show invasion of portal vein

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Ahuja, A. Diagnostic Imaging: Ultrasound. Salt Lake City, Utah: Amirsys; 2007. p 1-72~1-73.
questions.explanation: HCC周邊暈環典型為低迴聲(hypoechoic halo)（對應局部脂肪缺失），非高迴聲，故(B)為非典型。可呈高迴聲腫塊、鈣化罕見、可侵犯門脈皆為典型/正確敘述。

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT a typical ultrasound finding of urolithiasis?

options.text: Echogenic foci
Posterior acoustic shadowing
Twinkling artifacts on color Doppler ultrasound
Ureteral jet into the urinary bladder

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Ahuja, A. Diagnostic Imaging: Ultrasound. Salt Lake City, Utah: Amirsys; 2007. p 5-30~5-31.
questions.explanation: 輸尿管噴流為正常生理現象，非結石本身之直接超音波表現，故(D)為非典型。Echogenic foci、後方聲影、color Doppler twinkling artifact皆為結石之典型直接徵象。

questions.questionText: The time gain compensation (TGC) control, compensates for? Please select the CORRECT response.

options.text: The time take to undertake the scan
Attenuation deficits
The difference in ultrasound speed in different body tissues
The video image display lag time

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解
questions.explanation: TGC用以補償聲波隨深度增加而衰減(attenuation)之效應，使等回音組織於不同深度呈現相同亮度。非補償掃描所需時間、不同組織間聲速差異、或影像顯示延遲時間。

questions.questionText: Which of the following is least likely to improve a suboptimal US image?

options.text: Changing the focal point of the transducer
Altering the angle of the transducer
Turning the overall gain up to maximum
Moving the patient

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解
questions.explanation: 單純將整體增益(overall gain)調至最大最不可能改善影像品質，過度增益反使影像過曝、雜訊增加、對比下降。調整焦點位置、改變探頭角度、移動病人改善聲窗皆為有效方法。

questions.questionText: Which step will most improve image resolution? Please select the CORRECT response.

options.text: Increasing the depth
Reducing the frequency
Moving your point of interest to the lower part of the screen
Increasing the frequency

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解
questions.explanation: 提高探頭頻率可縮短波長、提升軸向與側向解析度，是提升解析度最有效方法，惟需犧牲穿透深度。增加深度、降低頻率、將目標移至螢幕下方皆不會改善解析度。

questions.questionText: Which statement about "Weigert-Meyer Rule" for ureteral duplication is correct?

options.text: Upper moiety ureter is subject to ureter obstruction.
Upper moiety ureter is associated with ectopic insertion and ureterocele.
The ectopic ureteral orifice is inferior and medial to orthotopic orifice.
Lower moiety ureter is subject to vesicoureteral reflux.
All statements are correct.

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Radiology Review Manual 6th edition
questions.explanation: 四項描述皆正確：Weigert-Meyer法則中，上極輸尿管開口偏內下(medial/inferior)且ectopic易合併ureterocele致阻塞；下極輸尿管開口偏外上易致vesicoureteral reflux。

questions.questionText: Which of the followings is NOT a recommended technique forming a suitable lipiodol-epirubicin emulsion for conventional TACE(cTACE) of hepatoma?

options.text: water-in-oil [W/O]
at least 20 pumping exchanges through the stopcock
the volume ratio of epirubicin solution and Lipiodol of 1:2
normal saline is recommended for preparation of epirubicin aqueous solution

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: J Vasc Interv Radiol 2017;28:1461-1466
questions.explanation: Epirubicin應溶於顯影劑（比重與Lipiodol相近約1.27）配製，而非生理食鹽水，故(D)非建議技術。W/O型態、至少20次stopcock抽吸交換、epirubicin溶液與Lipiodol體積比1:2皆為建議技術。

questions.questionText: Regarding the hepatocellular adenoma (HCA), which of the followings is accurate?

options.text: HCA is 10 times more common than focal nodular hyperplasia (FNH)
HCA has no risk of bleeding and malignant transformation
HCA has link with use of steroids
CT outperforms MRI in differential diagnosis of different types of HCA

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Journal of Hepatology 2016 vol. 65 j 386-398
questions.explanation: HCA之發生與口服避孕藥/雄性素類固醇使用有密切關聯，故(C)正確。HCA實際上約比FNH少見10倍(非常見10倍)；HCA具有出血與惡性轉化風險(非無風險)；MRI(非CT)在鑑別HCA不同分子亞型上表現較佳。

questions.questionText: According the 8th version of the American Joint Committee on Cancer (AJCC), which of the following T stage is accurate for hepatocellular carcinoma with tumor involvement of a major branch of the portal vein?

options.text: T1b
T2
T3
T4

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: AJCC cancer stage Version 8
questions.explanation: AJCC第8版HCC T分期中，單一或多發腫瘤任何大小併門脈或肝靜脈主要分支侵犯即歸為T4，與腫瘤大小無關。

questions.questionText: Which of the followings is NOT true while talking about air emboli?

options.text: A pressure gradient is not required to drive air into the vascular system; a central line or its tract (post-removal) is an example of such a connection.

As CVP may be sub-atmospheric at baseline in up to 40% of patients, those patients in an upright position or those undergoing IR procedures such as hemodialysis catheter placements are particularly susceptible.

Animal studies have been performed to estimate the volume of air required to produce lethal circulatory arrest, with case reported suggesting the lethal dose of air in adults to be between 200 and 300c.c., or 3-5 mL/kg
A 15 French (5 mm diameter) peel-away sheath used during placement of a tunneled hemodialysis catheter can allow 300 c.c. of air to enter the vascular system in just 0.5 s

questions.explanation: 空氣進入血管系統需要壓力梯度驅動，故(A)敘述之「不需要壓力梯度」為非真。中心靜脈導管或其拔除後之管道本身可構成連通路徑。CVP於40%病人可呈次大氣壓、成人致死量約200-300cc(3-5 mL/kg)、15Fr peel-away鞘管可於0.5秒內使300cc空氣進入血管系統，皆為正確敘述。

questions.questionText: Which of the following descriptions about small bowel is wrong?

options.text: Small bowel neoplasms are rare lesions that account for less than 5% of all gastrointestinal neoplasms.
Small bowel lymphoma is characteristically associated with marked lumen dilation.
Mesenteric mass with desmoplastic reaction and calcification may suggest the diagnosis of carcinoid tumor.
Gastrointestinal stromal tumors are intramural or subserosal tumors, which cannot be intraluminal location.

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解
questions.explanation: GIST傾向壁內生長，但腫瘤夠大時可向腔內凸出(bulging intraluminal)或向外突出(extramural)，並非不可能腔內生長，故(D)為錯誤敘述。小腸腫瘤<5%佔所有GI腫瘤、小腸淋巴瘤伴明顯腔擴張、類癌腸繫膜腫塊合併促結締組織增生反應與鈣化皆為正確敘述。

questions.questionText: 關於 splenic injury 的敘述，下列何者錯誤?

options.text: 根據最新 The American Association for the Surgery of Trauma (AAST) 的分級，Active bleeding confined within splenic capsule 屬於 grade 4 injury.
承上，Active bleeding extending beyond the spleen into the peritoneum，but Parenchymal laceration >3 cm in depth. 屬於 grade 5 injury
為了盡可能保留脾臟，一旦CT發現脾臟出血，就應該立刻施行TAE
脾臟摘除之後的病患，對於 encapsulated organisms 的抵抗力會變差。

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Uptodate, Topic 7957 version 26.0
questions.explanation: 治療決策須依血液動力學穩定度分層：穩定之低分級(I-III)損傷病人優先建議保守治療；穩定但見active contrast extravasation/contrast blush者才建議脾栓塞優於觀察，非CT一發現出血就一律立即TAE，故(C)為錯誤敘述。AAST分級(bleeding侷限包膜內=Grade IV、延伸入腹腔=Grade V)、脾切除後對莢膜細菌抵抗力下降皆為正確敘述。

questions.questionText: Which of the following descriptions is wrong?

options.text: Pancreaticobiliary maljunction (PBM) usually forms a long common channel.
Prevalence of PBM is much higher in Asian people than Western people.
MR cholangiopancreatography is an important modality in diagnosis of PBM, featuring pancreaticobiliary junction located outside the duodenal wall.
PBM cannot be diagnosed without the presence of biliary dilatation.
PBM is associated with higher risk of biliary cancer.

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: RadioGraphics 2020 40:2, 378-392.
questions.explanation: PBM即使不伴膽道擴張仍可診斷，惟此類無擴張型較難診斷，多數成人病例經由膽道癌臨床徵象發現，故(D)為錯誤敘述。PBM通常形成過長共同管、亞洲族群盛行率遠高於西方、MRCP特徵為膽胰管匯合位於十二指腸壁外、PBM與較高膽道癌風險相關，皆為正確敘述。

questions.questionText: Which of the followings is not a main risk factor for local recurrence of rectal cancer?

options.text: Circumferential resection margin(CRM) positivity
Close proximity of the tumor to the anal verge
Higher tumor differentiation
Extramural vascular invasion(EMVI)
Anastomotic leak

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: RadioGraphics 2019; 39:367-387
questions.explanation: 實際上是較差分化(lower differentiation)才是局部復發危險因子，非較高分化，故(C)非危險因子。CRM陽性、腫瘤靠近肛緣、EMVI、吻合口滲漏皆為確立之局部復發危險因子。

questions.questionText: Which of the following regarding renal cell carcinoma is not true?

options.text: Clear cell type is the most common subtype
Clear cell type typically exhibits exophytic growth and tends to be heterogeneous due to necrosis, hemorrhage or cystic change
Calcification is more common in the papillary and chromophone subtype
Cleat cell RCC have a better prognosis and less likelihood of metastasus than the other subtypes of RCC

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: World J Radiol 2016; 8(5)484-500
questions.explanation: 實際上clear cell RCC預後較差、轉移傾向較高（相對papillary/chromophobe），故(D)為非真敘述。Clear cell最常見亞型且呈exophytic異質性生長(壞死/出血/囊變)、鈣化於papillary/chromophobe較常見，皆為正確敘述。

questions.questionText: About Temporal Bone Trauma, which statement is Correct ?

options.text: The most common site of ossicular dislocation is the incudostapedial joint.
Incudomalleolar junction dislocations are the second most common, often occur with longitudinal temporal bone fractures.
The incudomalleolar joint normally forms the so-called "ice-cream cone" sign on axial CT images
all of above

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Radiographics. May 2020, 40(4):1148-1162
questions.explanation: 四項描述皆正確：incudostapedial joint為聽小骨脫位最常見部位；incudomalleolar junction脫位第二常見且常合併縱向顳骨骨折；正常incudomalleolar joint軸位CT呈ice-cream cone徵象。

questions.questionText: About oropharyngeal squamous cell carcinoma (OPSCC), which one is "WRONG"?

options.text: Smoking-related OPSCC tends to occur in younger patients.
Nonsmokers with HPV-positive OPSCC have the best prognosis with 3-year overall survival of 93%.
Despite multiple metastatic nodes, the prognosis is not poor for these p16-positive tumors, resulting in reevaluation of the nodal tables.
The most common source of a metastatic cervical LN in level II is a p16-positive OPSCC arising from the tonsil-like tissue of the palatine and lingual tonsils

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: RadioGraphics 2019; 39:2055-2068
questions.explanation: 實際上HPV相關(非抽菸相關)OPSCC才好發較年輕病人，故(A)為錯誤敘述。不吸菸HPV陽性OPSCC三年存活率93%預後最佳、p16陽性腫瘤多發轉移淋巴結預後仍不差(促使N分期表格重新評估)、level II轉移淋巴結最常見來源為顎/舌扁桃體之p16陽性OPSCC，皆為正確敘述。

questions.questionText: Which is included in machine learning technique?

options.text: Neural networks
Decision trees
k-nearest neighbors
Support vector machine
All the above

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Koçak B, Durmaz EŞ, Ateş E, Kılıçkesmez Ö. Radiomics with artificial intelligence: a practical guide for beginners. Diagn Interv Radiol. 2019 Nov; 25(6): 485-495.
questions.explanation: Neural networks、decision trees、k-nearest neighbors、support vector machine皆屬機器學習技術範疇。

questions.questionText: Which is the factor associated with aneurysm recurrence after coiling?

options.text: Volume
Packing density
Usage of stent
Location
All of above

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Huang DZ, Jiang B, He W, Wang YH, Wang ZG. Risk factors for the recurrence of an intracranial saccular aneurysm following endovascular treatment. Oncotarget. 2017 May 16;8(20):33676-33682.
questions.explanation: 動脈瘤體積、栓塞密度、是否使用輔助支架、動脈瘤位置皆與栓塞術後復發相關。

questions.questionText: According to AJCC 8th edition of buccal cancer, what is the clinical staging of one 3.6cm tumor mass at right tongue with right genioglossus muscle involvement and one 2.5cm metastatic lymph node at left neck level IIA?

options.text: T3N2c
T4N2b
T2N2a
T4N2a
T2N2c

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: AJCC 8th edition
questions.explanation: 腫瘤3.6cm(2-4cm範圍)且DOI未達>10mm故為T2；轉移淋巴結位於對側(contralateral)頸部(腫瘤右側、淋巴結左側)，即使單一顆對側淋巴結≤6cm仍歸為N2c。

questions.questionText: Which is wrong about "persistent stapedial artery (PSA)" ?

options.text: It can cause conductive hearing loss or pulsatile tinnitus
It may be an isolated anomaly or associated with an aberrant ICA.
There is no vidian canal in cases of PSA.
None of above.

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Thiers FA, Sakai O, Poe DS, et al. Persistent Stapedial Artery: CT Findings. AJNR 2000;21:1551-4.
questions.explanation: PSA之影像關鍵徵象是無foramen spinosum(因中腦膜動脈血流改由PSA供應)，與vidian canal無關，PSA不影響vidian canal之存在，故(C)為錯誤敘述。可致傳導性聽損/搏動性耳鳴、可單獨或合併aberrant ICA，皆為正確敘述。

questions.questionText: Which one of the following statements about pulmonary embolism is false?

options.text: Most pulmonary emboli resolve without sequelae.
Acute pulmonary embolism cause more severe pulmonary hypertension and cor pulmonale than chronic thromboembolism.
Patients with underlying malignancy, cardiovascular, or pulmonary disease are at increased risk of pulmonary embolism.
Mosaic perfusion pattern may be seen in chronic pulmonary thromboembolism.

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: RadioGraphics 2009, CT Diagnosis of Chronic Pulmonary Thromboembolism
questions.explanation: 實際上是慢性血栓栓塞才因血管長期重塑導致更嚴重之肺動脈高壓與肺心症，非急性肺栓塞，故(B)為假。多數肺栓塞自行消退不留後遺症、惡性腫瘤/心血管/肺部疾病增加風險、mosaic perfusion pattern見於慢性肺血栓栓塞症，皆正確。

questions.questionText: Which one is WRONG for imaging features of COVID-19.

options.text: The typical findings on CT is ground-glass opacities ( bilateral, subpleural, peripheral) crazy paving appearance, air space consolidation, bronchovascular thickening, traction bronchiectasis.
Contrast chest CT is the first-line screening imaging modality for COVID-19 in daily practice.
The primary findings of COVID-19 on chest radiograph and CT are those of atypical pneumonia or organizing pneumonia in peak stage (9-13 days)
Mediastinal lymphadenopathy, pleural effusion, multiple tiny pulmonary nodules, cavitation are relative atypical.

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Simpson S et al. Radiological Society of North America Expert Consensus Statement on Reporting Chest CT Findings Related to COVID-19. Radiology: Cardiothoracic Imaging 2020 2:2.
questions.explanation: 常規篩檢CT並非第一線診斷工具，多數放射學會不建議以CT作為COVID-19常規篩檢方法，故(B)為錯誤敘述。典型CT表現、高峰期呈非典型/機化性肺炎、縱膈淋巴結病變等相對非典型徵象之描述，皆為正確敘述。

questions.questionText: Which one is WRONG for imaging features of thoracic metastases from gynecologic neoplasms.

options.text: Metastases from endometrial carcinoma exhibit imaging features identical to those of ovarian cancers.
Thoracic metastases from ovarian cancer often manifest with small pleural effusions and subtle pleural nodules.
Thoracic metastases to the lungs, lymph nodes, and pleura may also exhibit calcification and mimic granulomatous disease.

Some pulmonary metastases from gynecologic malignancies exhibit characteristic features such as cavitation (in squamous cell cervical cancer) and the "halo" sign (in hemorrhagic metastatic choriocarcinoma)

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Martínez-Jiménez S., Rosado-de-Christenson M.L., Walker C.M., et al: Imaging features of thoracic metastases from gynecologic neoplasms. Radiographics 2014; 34: pp. 1742-1754
questions.explanation: 子宮內膜癌轉移呈indolent型態，與卵巢癌(小量肋膜積液合併細微結節、可鈣化)表現不同，並非相同，故(A)為錯誤敘述。卵巢癌轉移表現、鈣化類似肉芽腫性疾病、子宮頸鱗癌空洞化/絨毛膜癌halo徵象皆正確。

questions.questionText: About "seronegative spondyloarthropathies", which one is wrong?

options.text: These disorders are all linked to the HLA-B27 histocompatibility antigen.
Ankylosing spondylitis classically has marginal, symmetric syndesmophytes
Psoriatic arthritis and Reiter syndrome classically have Nonmarginal, asymmetric syndesmophytes.
Involvement of the SI joints is not common.

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Fundamentals of Skeletal Radiology, 2020, 5th ed., Chapter 6, 119-150
questions.explanation: 實際上薦髂關節侵犯在此疾病家族中常見，並非罕見，故(D)為錯誤敘述。皆與HLA-B27相關、僵直性脊椎炎邊緣性對稱性syndesmophytes、乾癬性關節炎與萊特氏症候群非邊緣性不對稱性syndesmophytes，皆正確。

questions.questionText: In a Stener lesion, what structure entrapped the ulnar collateral ligament of first metacarpophalangeal joint, which resulted in the need for surgery?

options.text: Flexor pollicis longus
Extensor pollicis longus
Adductor aponeurosis
Radial collateral ligament

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Lee Patrick, Tim B. Hunter and Mihra Taljanovic. "Musculoskeletal Colloquialisms: How Did We Come Up with These Names?" Radiographics 24 (4) (July 2004). P. 1009-1027.
questions.explanation: 完全斷裂之UCL近端斷端回縮並移位至內收肌腱膜(adductor pollicis aponeurosis)淺層，被腱膜阻隔卡住無法回到原止點，故無法自行癒合須手術。

questions.questionText: The combination of radial head fracture and dislocation of distal radio-ulnar joint is called?

options.text: Monteggia fracture
Galeazzi fracture
Essex-Lopresti fracture
nightstick fracture

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Pope TL, Harris JH. Harris and Harris' the Radiology of Emergency Medicine. 5th ed. Philadelphia, PA: Lippincott Williams & Wilkins; 2013: 366.
questions.explanation: 橈骨頭骨折合併遠端橈尺關節脫位稱為Essex-Lopresti fracture。Monteggia為尺骨近端骨折+橈骨頭脫位、Galeazzi為橈骨遠端骨折+遠端橈尺關節脫位。

questions.questionText: Wrisberg rip tear of the posterior horn of lateral meniscus originates at the attachment of the ligament of Wrisberg. This pattern is commonly associated with what kind of the following ligamentous injury?

options.text: Anterior cruciate ligament (ACL) tears
Posterior cruciate ligament (PCL) tears
Medial collateral ligament (MCL) tears
Fibular collateral ligament (FCL) tears

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Meniscal Tears Scanned, Scooped, and Sculpted. RadioGraphics 2015; 35:1138-1139
questions.explanation: ACL斷裂後之膝關節不穩定使外側半月板後角承受異常應力，增加Wrisberg rip型態撕裂之風險。

questions.questionText: Which of the followings is Palmer type 1B injury of triangular fibrocartilage complex (TFCC)?

options.text: Ulnar avulsion with or without distal ulnar fracture
Distal avulsion of ulnocarpal ligaments
Radial avulsion with or without sigmoid notch fracture
all of above

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Magn Reson Med Sci 2017; 16; 3-15. High-Resolution 3T MR Imaging of the Triangular Fibrocartilage Complex
questions.explanation: TFCC Palmer type 1B為尺側撕脫，可合併或不合併尺骨遠端骨折。1c為遠端撕脫(ulnotriquetral/ulnolunate韌帶)、1d為橈側撕脫(±sigmoid notch骨折)。

questions.questionText: Which of the following is not one of seat belt-related injuries?

options.text: laryngotracheal injury
bowel and mesenteric injuries
C7 and T1 transverse process fractures
hip dislocation

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Pattern Recognition: A Mechanism-based Approach to Injury Detection after Motor Vehicle Collisions. RadioGraphics 2019; 39:857-876
questions.explanation: 髖關節脫位屬儀表板相關損傷(dashboard-related injuries)，非安全帶相關損傷。喉氣管損傷、腸道與腸繫膜損傷、C7/T1橫突骨折皆為安全帶相關損傷之典型表現。

questions.questionText: 關於心臟核磁共振造影(Cardiovascular Magnetic Resonance，CMR)所使用的顯影劑，下列何者錯誤？

options.text: 目前臨床上只有含釓顯影劑(gadolinium-based contrast agents) CMR顯影所使用。
含釓顯影劑(gadolinium-based contrast agents)在臨床上的安全性很高，發生嚴重併發症腎因性全身纖維化(Nephrogenic systemic fibrosis，NSF)的機率約1%。
NSF是一種間質組織發炎反應，造成全身性影響，包括皮膚硬結、四肢攣縮、多重器官纖維化，以致最終死亡。
發生NSF的風險因子包括腎絲球過濾率小於30毫升/分鐘、急性腎臟衰竭，以及末期腎臟疾病需血液透析者
在目前尚未有腎絲球過濾率大於或等於30毫升/分鐘之慢性腎臟衰竭患者發生過NSF的案例

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Heart Disease_ Eugene Braunwald (2019年11版) Ch. 17, P302
questions.explanation: 含釓顯影劑發生NSF之機率遠低於1%（eGFR<30族群<1/10,000），並非約1%，故(B)為錯誤敘述。NSF是間質組織發炎反應致皮膚硬結/肢體攣縮/多重器官纖維化、風險因子含eGFR<30/急性腎衰竭/末期腎病需透析、目前無eGFR≥30患者發生NSF案例，皆為正確敘述。

questions.questionText: Which of the following imaging appearance is NOT related to agenesis of corpus callosum?

options.text: Racing car sign
Moose head sign
Colpocephaly
Molar tooth sign

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Cherian EV, Shenoy KV, Bukelo MJ, Thomas DA. Racing car brings tear drops in the moose. BMJ Case Rep. 2013;2013:bcr2012008165.
questions.explanation: Molar tooth sign與胼胝體發育不全無關，屬Joubert症候群及相關疾病之中腦徵象(上小腦腳拉長)。Racing car sign、moose head sign、colpocephaly皆為胼胝體發育不全之典型影像表現。

questions.questionText: Which description about disease of neonatal chest is incorrect?

options.text: Infantile respiratory distress syndrome, previously known as hyaline membrane disease, usually occurs in premature infants.
Cesarean section, prolonged labor and maternal aneshesis or diabetes are shown to be contributing factors of fetal lung fluid retention.
Meconium aspiration syndrome is related to perinal stress and commonly ocurrs in pre-term infant.
Pulmonary interstitial emphysema (PIE) and bronchopulmonary dysplasia (BPD) are possible complications of ventilatory therapy for iinfantile respiratory distress syndrme

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: The requisites: Pediatric Radiology 3rd edition p.26~30
questions.explanation: 胎便吸入症候群(MAS)實際上常發生於足月或過期產兒，非早產兒，故(C)為錯誤敘述。IRDS好發早產兒、剖腹產/產程延長/母體麻醉或糖尿病為胎兒肺液滯留促成因子、PIE與BPD為IRDS呼吸器治療之可能併發症，皆正確。

questions.questionText: Which description about child abuse is incorrect?

options.text: In children less than 2 years of age who are possible victims of abuse, a skeletal survey is mandatory. A "babygram" consisting of single or few images of the entire infant is unsatisfactory.
Follow-up skeletal survey performed 2 weeks later is not necessary.
Radiographic skeletal surveys should be performed in all cases of fatal suspected abuse and unexplained infant death, following the same protocol as used in living infants.
Computed tomography (CT) and magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) are used to evaluate suspected head trauma.

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Caffey's Pediatric Diagnostic Imaging 13ed Ch.143 p. 1454-1463
questions.explanation: 追加複查骨骼調查(通常2週後)是必要的，可提高診斷率並協助精確判斷損傷時間，故(B)為錯誤敘述。2歲以下完整骨骼調查為必要(babygram不足)、死亡病例應依相同協定調查、CT/MRI用於評估疑似頭部外傷，皆正確。

questions.questionText: Which of the following is WRONG about adenomyosis?

options.text: "Swiss cheese" appearance of myometrium in cystic adenomyosis
HSG shows multiple small linear / saccular diverticula extending into myometrium
Focal widening of junctional zone ≥12 mm hypointense on T2WI
None of above

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Dahnert Radiology Review Manual 7th edition p.1046-1047
questions.explanation: A/B/C三項描述皆正確：囊性adenomyosis呈Swiss cheese外觀、HSG可見多發線狀/囊袋狀憩室延伸入肌層、局部junctional zone增寬≥12mm於T2WI呈低訊號，皆為典型表現，故答案為D(none of above，即無錯誤選項)。

questions.questionText: Which of the following description about breast calcification is WRONG?

options.text: The morphology of suspicious calcification includes amorphous, coarse heterogeneous, dystrophic, fine pleomorphic, and fine-linear or fine linear–branching
Fine-linear or fine linear–branching calcification account for the highest positive predictive value among all suspicious calcifications
rim calcification is the typical finding of oil cyst
Large, dense, sharply marginated mass with popcorn like calcifications is the typical finding of involuting fibroadenoma

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Breast Imaging: The Requisites 3rd edition Ch3
questions.explanation: 可疑鈣化型態實際上僅四類(amorphous、coarse heterogeneous、fine pleomorphic、fine-linear/branching)，dystrophic實屬典型良性型態，不應列入可疑清單，故(A)為錯誤敘述。Fine-linear/branching PPV最高、rim鈣化為oil cyst典型表現、大而邊界銳利合併爆米花狀鈣化為involuting fibroadenoma典型表現，皆正確。

questions.questionText: Which description about Biliary atresia is correct?

options.text: Biliary atresia is the most common cause of neonatal cholestasis and more common in Asian populations, in particular Chinese and Japanese infants.

Biliary atresia usually presents in the first month of life with jaundice, light colored stools, and direct hyperbilirubinemia. Untreated, it progresses to end-stage liver disease and death within the first 3 years of life.
It is important to diagnose biliary atresia early because infants less than 2 months of age treated with the Kasai procedure tend to have a good long-term prognosis
All of above.

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Caffey's Pediatric Diagnostic Imaging 13ed Ch.87 p.810-815
questions.explanation: 四項描述皆正確：膽道閉鎖為新生兒膽汁鬱積最常見原因且好發亞洲(中國/日本)嬰兒、通常出生第一個月內表現且未治療3年內進展至末期肝病死亡、2個月大以前接受Kasai手術者長期預後較佳。

questions.questionText: Which of the following feature is least likely seen in benign ovarian mass?

options.text: absence of papillary projection
thin wall <3 mm
increased echogenicity within a cyst
unilocularity of cyst

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Dahnert Radiology Review Manual 7th edition p.1029
questions.explanation: 良性單純囊腫內部應為無回音，回音增加提示出血/感染/複雜成分，非典型良性特徵，故(C)最不可能見於良性卵巢腫塊。無乳突狀突起、壁薄<3mm、單房性皆為典型良性特徵。

questions.questionText: Which of the following feature is suggestive of malignancy in breast MRI?

options.text: Circumscribed or gently lobulated margin
Nonenhancing internal septations
lesions traversing Cooper's ligaments
Center enhances first

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Breast Imaging: The Requisites 3rd edition Ch7
questions.explanation: 病灶穿越Cooper's韌帶提示浸潤性生長、破壞正常解剖界線，為惡性徵象。邊緣清楚或輕度分葉、內部無強化之分隔、中央先強化皆為良性特徵。

questions.questionText: Which is the most common location of bronchial atresia?

options.text: RUL
RML
RLL
LUL
LLL

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Webb, W.R., & Higgins, C.B. (2005). Thoracic imaging: pulmonary and cardiovascular radiology. USA: LWW, pp. 2-4.
questions.explanation: 支氣管閉鎖典型發生於節段或次節段層級，可侵犯任一肺葉，最常見於左上肺葉(LUL)之尖後段(apicoposterior segment)，其次為右上肺葉。

questions.questionText: About CT attenuation, which one is CORRECT

options.text: The unit is after the name of a sole CT inventor
It linearly correlates with the physical density of the human body
The optimal HU of contrast enhanced artery is about 800 HU
normal lung parenchyma is about -700 to -950 HU

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Primer of Diagnostic Radiology, 5th ed. Weissleder. P.4
questions.explanation: 正常肺實質約-700至-950 HU，故(D)正確。HU以Hounsfield命名但非唯一CT發明者(Cormack共同獲諾貝爾獎)、HU非直接與物理密度線性相關(實為衰減係數之線性轉換)、冠狀動脈CTA最佳血管內強化約250-300 HU非800 HU，其餘選項皆錯誤。

questions.questionText: Current gadolinium chelates (e.g., Gd-DTPA) that are commonly used as CMR contrast agents are:

options.text: Intracellular agents
Extracellular agents
60% extracellular and 40% intracellular
Extracellular for the first 5 minutes after administration and then intracellular

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Jain A, Tandri H, Calkins H, Bluemke DA. Role of cardiovascular magnetic resonance imaging in arrhythmogenic right ventricular dysplasia. J Cardiovasc Magn Reson. 2008;10:32.
questions.explanation: 多數含釓對比劑(GBCA)為細胞外對比劑，分布於血管與組織間質，非細胞內攝取(Primovist等肝細胞特異性製劑為例外)。

questions.questionText: For coronary magnetic resonance (MR) angiography, data are typically obtained over several cardiac cycles. To freeze cardiac motion, it is desirable to obtain image data during a very short time period within each cycle. What would the optimal time for data collection be?

options.text: 75 ms after the QRS
Early systole
Early diastole
Mid diastole

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Seifarth H, Wienbeck S, Pusken M, Juergens KU, Maintz D, Vahlhaus C, Heindel W, Fischbach R. Optimal systolic and diastolic reconstruction windows for coronary CT angiography using dual-source CT. AJR Am J Roentgenol. 2007;189:1317-1323.
questions.explanation: 多數低至中等心率病人，舒張中期(mid diastole)為心臟週期最平靜之時相，最適合凍結心臟運動、獲取影像資料。

questions.questionText: Which of the following statements is correct regarding the usefulness of CMR coronary angiography?

options.text: It is indicated to assess for significant CAD
It is indicated for screening of subclinical atherosclerosis
It has high sensitivity but low–moderate specificity for detection of proximal and mid-significant CAD in selected individuals
It is not useful for assessment of coronary anomalies

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Jahnke C, Paetsch I, Nehrke K, Schnackenburg B, Gebker R, Fleck E, et al. Rapid and complete coronary arterial tree visualization with magnetic resonance imaging: Feasibility and diagnostic performance. Eur Heart J. 2005;26:2313-9.
questions.explanation: 冠狀動脈MRA對偵測近端/中段顯著CAD於選定族群中呈現高敏感度但中低特異度(約94%/57%)。並非適用於評估顯著CAD之常規指標(CT較適用)、亦非次臨床動脈粥狀硬化篩檢工具；對冠狀動脈異常評估則有其角色(非無用)。

questions.questionText: The etiology of enlargement of main pulmonary artery includes

options.text: Pulmonary arterial hypertension
Congenital absent pulmonary valve
Absence of left pericardium
Aneurysm of pulmonary artery
All of above

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Webb, W.R., & Higgins, C.B. (2005). Thoracic imaging: pulmonary and cardiovascular radiology. USA: LWW, pp. 675.
questions.explanation: 肺動脈高壓、先天性肺動脈瓣缺失、左側心包缺如、肺動脈瘤皆為主肺動脈擴大之已知病因。

questions.questionText: About anomalous origin of the coronary artery from the opposite sinus (ACAOS), which one is not correct?

options.text: ACAOS takes one of the following courses to reach its dependent myocardial territory: interarterial, transseptal (or subpulmonic), retroaortic, and prepulmonic.
An interarterial course is the abnormality most consistently associated with sudden cardiac death.
Right ACAOS is more commonly associated with sudden cardiac death than left ACAOS
Slitlike orifice, acute angle of origin, and intramural segment are anatomic features that confer a higher risk of sudden cardiac death.

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Anomalous Coronary Arteries That Need Intervention: Review of Pre- and Postoperative Imaging Appearances, RadioGraphics 2017; 37:740-757
questions.explanation: 實際上左側ACAOS與猝死關聯性較強，右側雖較常見(約為左側3倍)但關聯性較弱，故(C)不正確。走行路徑分四類、interarterial course最一致相關於SCD、高風險解剖特徵(裂縫狀開口/銳角起源/管壁內走行段)，皆為正確敘述。

questions.questionText: About "intramural blood pool" in aortic intramural hematoma, which is CORRECT

options.text: it is hypothesized to be result from tearing of intima
its prognosis is similar to the ulcer-like projection
it rarely presents as multiple lesions
this term is relatively new, recently defined in 2011.

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Radiology 2011, Mar. https://doi.org/10.1148/radiol.10101270
questions.explanation: IBP一詞於2011年才正式定義，故(D)正確。IBP假說為主動脈壁剪力撕裂所致(非單純內膜撕裂)、與ULP預後不同(非相似)、可多發並非罕見。

questions.questionText: About beyond prostate adenocarcinoma, which one is correct?

options.text: Most sarcomas appear as well-circumscribed masses that are homogeneously hypointense on T1WI, and heteogenous on T2WI, and enhance avidly after contrast material administration.
Paragangliomas can be distinguished from adenocarcinoma on the basis of their T2 signal intensity, because adenocarcinoma is T2 hypointense.
Bladder cancer is the most common carncer to involve the prostate because of its proximity to the prostate gland.
All of the above

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Radiographics 2016; 36: 1055-1075
questions.explanation: 多數肉瘤呈邊界清楚、T1均質低訊號、T2異質且明顯強化；副神經節瘤可藉T2訊號較高(腺癌低訊號)與MIBG閃爍攝影與腺癌鑑別；膀胱癌因解剖鄰近是最常侵犯攝護腺之腫瘤，皆正確。

questions.questionText: About locally advanced and metastatic RCC, which one is correct?

options.text: RCC has been reported to metastasize to any part of the human body, including scalp, oral cavity, thyroid, and testis, etc..
RCC is characterized by tumor heterogeneity, a phenomenon in which different clones of cells with specific genomic alterations coexist in primary tumor and possibly even metastases.
As with most malignancies, the time of greatest risk for recurrence of RCC is early after treatment, with the midian time to relapse within 1-2 years after surgery..
All of the above

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Radiographics. 2019;39:998-1016
questions.explanation: RCC可轉移至任何部位(含頭皮/口腔/甲狀腺/睪丸)、具高度腫瘤異質性(不同基因變異細胞株可共存於原發與轉移病灶)、復發風險最高於治療後早期(中位復發時間術後1-2年內)，皆正確。

questions.questionText: About CT cystography for suspicion of traumatic UB injury, which one is wrong?

options.text: Understanding the indications and optimal protocol for CT cystography in the acute traumatic setting is critical for efficient and accurate diagnosis .
Prior to performing CT cystography, first check urethral injury prior to Foley catheter placement.
Type 3 UB injury shows focal contrast extravasation near UB, but without extension into the intra- or extraperitoneal spaces.
None of the above

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Radiographics. 2018;38:92-93
questions.explanation: 了解適應症與最佳規範至關重要、應先排除尿道損傷再置Foley導尿管、Type 3損傷為局部對比劑貫穿但未延伸腹膜腔內外空間，A/B/C皆正確，故答案為D(none of the above)。

questions.questionText: About renal cell carcinoma staging, which is Stage T3c?

options.text: Tumor invades beyond gerota fascia
Tumor extends into ipsilateral adrenal gland
Tumor grossly extends into the vena cava above diaphragm
Tumor grossly extends into the renal vein or its segmental branches

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Diagnostic Imaging Oncology, 5-16
questions.explanation: T3c定義為侵犯橫膈以上下腔靜脈或下腔靜脈管壁。侵犯超過Gerota筋膜為T4；侵犯同側腎上腺亦屬T4；侵犯腎靜脈或其節段分支為T3a。

questions.questionText: "anteater sign" is tarsal coalition sign, and It showed:

options.text: Calcaneonavicular coalition
Talocalcaneal Coalition
Cubonavicular coalition
Talonavicular Coalition

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Radiographics. 2000;20:321-332
questions.explanation: anteater sign為跟骨前突延長形似食蟻獸長吻部，為calcaneonavicular coalition之特徵性側位X光間接徵象。

questions.questionText: Which structure may cause Pronator Syndrome?

options.text: A+B
A+B+C
B+D
B+C

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Imaging of the Musculoskeletal System - Compressive and Entrapment Neuropathies of the Upper and Lower Extremities
questions.explanation: Ligament of struthers與supracondylar process(A+B)為Pronator Syndrome最主要致病結構，常合併出現。Ganglion cyst at spinoglenoid notch(C)造成肩胛上神經壓迫、thickened cubital tunnel retinaculum(D)造成尺神經肘隧道處壓迫，皆非旋前肌症候群之致病結構。

questions.questionText: Which tarsal bone has no muscular or tendinous attachments?

options.text: Calcaneus
Navicular
Talus
Cuboid

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: AJR 2010, Radiographic Assessment of Pediatric Foot Alignment
questions.explanation: 距骨(talus)無任何肌肉或肌腱附著，其血液供應完全依賴周邊韌帶與關節囊進入之血管，故骨折後易發生缺血性壞死(AVN)。

questions.questionText: When necrotizing fasciitis is suspected, which CT finding is important for definitive diagnosis?

options.text: Gas tracking with fluid collection along the fascial planes
Subcutaneous fat stranding
Skin thickening
Muscle enlargement with enhancement

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: AJR 2010, Imaging of Necrotizing Fasciitis
questions.explanation: 壞死性筋膜炎CT定性診斷之關鍵徵象為「氣體沿筋膜層追蹤合併液體聚積(gas tracking with fluid collection along fascial planes)」；皮下脂肪絮狀變化、皮膚增厚、肌肉腫大強化皆為非特異性軟組織感染徵象，無法確診壞死性筋膜炎。

questions.questionText: Which is TRUE regarding secondary osteosarcomas?

options.text: Secondary osteosarcoma is associated with underlying Paget's disease
Secondary osteosarcoma occurs exclusively after radiation therapy
Secondary osteosarcoma has a better prognosis than primary osteosarcoma
Secondary osteosarcoma most commonly affects children

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: AJR 2008, Imaging of Osteosarcoma After Irradiation
questions.explanation: 續發性骨肉瘤(secondary osteosarcoma)與潛在Paget氏病相關(Paget肉瘤變)，並非僅發生於放射治療後；多見於中老年人(非兒童為主)，預後較原發性骨肉瘤差。

questions.questionText: Which is the most common cause of spontaneous intracranial hemorrhage in young adults?

options.text: Vascular malformation
Hypertension
Coagulopathy
Amyloid angiopathy

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Osborn's Brain Imaging, Pathology and Anatomy, p.112
questions.explanation: 年輕成人自發性腦出血最常見病因為血管畸形(vascular malformation，如AVM、海綿狀血管瘤)，其次為藥物濫用(古柯鹼、安非他命)；高血壓性出血好發於中老年人，amyloid angiopathy亦好發於老年人腦葉出血。

questions.questionText: Which one is not normal content of retropharyngeal space?

options.text: Fat
Salivary gland
Small vessels
Lymph nodes

questions.explanation: 咽後間隙(retropharyngeal space)正常內容物為脂肪組織、咽後淋巴結與小血管；唾液腺並非咽後間隙之正常內容物。

questions.questionText: Which is associated with retropharyngeal edema?

options.text: Calcific tendinitis
Internal jugular vein thrombosis
Radiation
All of the above

questions.explanation: 咽後間隙水腫(retropharyngeal edema)可見於鄰近發炎(如頸長肌鈣化性肌腱炎)、內頸靜脈栓塞、放射治療後等多種情形，故A/B/C皆正確。

questions.questionText: About the coronary artery vulnerable plaques, which is wrong?

options.text: Prone to rupture.
Tend to have a thin fibrous cap and a large lipid core.
Often visible by x-ray angiography.
Acute coronary syndromes often result from the rupture of modestly stenotic plaques.

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: MRI and CT of the Cardiovascular System, p.361
questions.explanation: 易損斑塊(vulnerable plaque)易破裂、具薄纖維帽與大脂質核心、急性冠心症常起因於狹窄程度不高之斑塊破裂，皆正確；但因血管代償性正性重塑(positive remodeling)，管腔常無明顯狹窄，故常規X光血管攝影(僅顯示管腔)常無法顯示此類斑塊，此敘述錯誤。

questions.questionText: The description about Agatston calcium scoring, which is wrong?

options.text: CT image greater than 120HU in density is identified as calcification.
The lesion must > 1mm square in area.
The sum of all lesions in all four coronary vessels(LM, LAD, LCx and RCA) corresponds to the total Agatston score.
The Agatston quantification method is of limited value for MDCT.

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: MRI and CT of the Cardiovascular System, p.377
questions.explanation: Agatston法鈣化定義門檻為**>130 HU**(非120HU)且面積>1mm²；四條冠狀動脈(LM/LAD/LCx/RCA)各病灶總和即為總Agatston分數，此法於MDCT仍廣泛適用(非限制其價值)，故A敘述錯誤。

questions.questionText: The diagnosis of ARVC by MRI is presently based on

options.text: The morphology of the right ventricle.
Global and regional function of right ventricle.
To differentiate fatty tissue from myocardium.
All of the above.

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: MRI and CT of the Cardiovascular System, p.160
questions.explanation: ARVC之MRI診斷需綜合右心室形態、整體與局部功能評估，以及脂肪組織與心肌之區別，三者皆為診斷依據，故答案為D(以上皆是)。

questions.questionText: Malignant coronary anomaly (often associated with sudden death) excluded,

options.text: The LM and RCA arising from the right aortic sinus, with the anomalous LM coursing between the aorta and pulmonary trunk.
The LM and RCA originating from the left aortic sinus and the anomalous RCA coursing between the aorta and pulmonary trunk.
Single left coronary artery.

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Computed Tomography of the Coronary Arteries, p.111
questions.explanation: 惡性冠狀動脈異常(常合併猝死)之典型定義為LM或RCA異常起源於對側竇並經interarterial course(主動脈與肺動脈幹間)走行，選項A、B皆屬此類。單一左冠狀動脈(single left coronary artery)本身並非此惡性異常之定義範疇，故被排除在外。

questions.questionText: About Tetralogy of Fallot, which statement is wrong?

options.text: Cyanotic congenital heart disease.
Included VSD, pulmonary stenosis, right ventricular hypertrophy and an overriding aorta.
The heart is usually not enlarged at birth but it may later become "Boot-shaped heart".
Left-to-right shunt.

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Grainger and Allison's Diagnostic Radiology, p.801
questions.explanation: 法洛氏四重症為發紺型先心病(A對)，含VSD/肺動脈狹窄/RVH/主動脈跨騎(B對)，出生時心臟通常不大、日後可呈靴狀心(C對)；但因右心室流出道阻塞造成經VSD之**右到左分流**（非左到右分流），故D敘述錯誤。

questions.questionText: Which is true about radiological exam of bladder trauma, regarding the choice between static cystography and CT cystography?

options.text: The choice between the two exams is largely dependent on the clinical situation and the preferences of the physicians involved.
If CT of the abdomen is considered to assess potential intra-abdominal injuries, CT cystography should be considered to assess the bladder
If the examination must be performed in the trauma unit with portable equipment, conventional static cystography is a reliable method for establishing the diagnosis of bladder injury.
All of the above are true.

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Clinical Urography, 2nd Edition, p.1799
questions.explanation: 傳統膀胱攝影與CT膀胱攝影之選擇取決於臨床情境與醫師偏好；若已排CT腹部評估腹內損傷應一併做CT膀胱攝影；若須於創傷單位以可攜式設備檢查，傳統靜態膀胱攝影仍為可靠方法，三者皆正確。

questions.questionText: Which is true about combined bladder and urethral injury?

options.text: Between 10% and 20% of male patients with an injury of the urethra and pelvic fracture have an injury of the bladder.
They may occur as separate injuries.
The bladder injury may be intraperitoneal, extraperitoneal, or rarely, a combined bladder injury.
All of the above are true.

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Clinical Urography, 2nd Edition, p.1831
questions.explanation: 合併骨盆骨折之尿道損傷男性病患中10-20%合併膀胱損傷；兩者可各自單獨發生；膀胱損傷可為腹膜腔內、腹膜腔外、或少見之合併型，三者皆正確。

questions.questionText: Which is true about scrotal trauma?

options.text: Scrotal trauma is usually a single injury resulting from a direct forceful compression of the testis or testes against the pubic ramus.
The testis may rupture, fracture, or undergo torsion.
Rupture or fracture occurs when the tunica albuginea is torn.
All of the above are true.

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Clinical Urography, 2nd Edition, p.1839
questions.explanation: 陰囊創傷常因單一直接暴力將睪丸壓迫於恥骨枝而造成；睪丸可能破裂、骨折或扭轉；破裂/骨折發生於白膜(tunica albuginea)撕裂時。⚠️ 官方詳解本身於此頁加註「題目應該是false?」並補充陰囊外傷可合併副睪骨折、副睪炎、陰囊壁血腫、陰囊積液等睪丸外損傷，對本題官方標示答案A(而非D，以上皆是)表達存疑，暫依官方標示A為預設值，建議醫師覆核。

questions.questionText: Which one of following entities has a key imaging feature of T1 hyperintensity in the pulvinar?

options.text: Japan encephalitis
Fabry disease
Susac syndrome
Proteus syndrome

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Radiopaedia; Insights Imaging. 2018 Dec;9(6):1077-1088
questions.explanation: 法布瑞氏症(Fabry disease)因醣脂沉積於深部灰質(尤其視丘枕核pulvinar)導致鈣化/礦化，於T1WI呈高訊號，即pulvinar sign，見於少數(約3%)重度腎功能受損之男性病患。

questions.questionText: The "hummingbird sign", also known as "penguin sign" refers to the appearance of sagittal image of the brainstem in patients with __________.

options.text: Bickerstaff brainstem encephalitis
CLIPPERS
Wernicke encephalopathy
Progressive supranuclear palsy

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Radiopaedia
questions.explanation: 進行性核上性麻痺(PSP)因中腦被蓋萎縮，矢狀切面上腦幹上緣由正常上凸變為扁平/凹陷，形似蜂鳥/企鵝之頭部與身體輪廓，稱為hummingbird sign(penguin sign)；另有軸位mickey mouse appearance與morning glory sign等徵象。中腦/橋腦面積比(midbrain to pons area ratio)降至約0.12(正常約0.24)為最準確之影像特徵，並可與MSA-P（橋腦與中腦皆萎縮）區分。

questions.questionText: 在磁振造影中，下列何種波序在針對顱內出血性病灶有較佳的偵測效率?

options.text: Spin Echo
Turbo Spin Echo
Gradient echo (GE)
無差異

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: MRI IN PRACTICE, Ch.2, p.34
questions.explanation: 梯度回波(Gradient echo, GE)波序因無180度重聚脈衝，對磁場不均勻性(如出血產物之順磁性代謝物造成之磁化率效應)較敏感，故對顱內出血性病灶之偵測效率優於Spin Echo或Turbo Spin Echo。

questions.questionText: 游離輻射的特性，下列何者為非?

options.text: 可感受到熱
無色
無味
無感覺

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: 原子、輻射、與輻射防護, Ch.1, p.2
questions.explanation: 游離輻射之特性為無色、無味、人體無法直接感知(無感覺)；於低能量傳遞情形下亦通常無明顯熱效應。⚠️ 官方詳解答案標示為D，但官方詳解本身於此頁加註存疑「但好像不會有什麼heating effect」，質疑選項A(可感受到熱)是否才是錯誤敘述(游離輻射一般而言不會被人體直接感受到熱)，與官方標示D有出入，已於ionizing-radiation-characteristics.md加註[!warning]callout，暫依官方標示D為預設值，建議醫師覆核。

questions.questionText: 關於游離輻射的型態，可分為粒子型及電磁波型游離輻射，在此一分類下，以下敘述何者為非?

options.text: X-ray 與 r-ray 型態上完全相同，具高度穿透能力，為粒子型游離輻射
粒子型游離輻射是由粒子本身之動能或電位能使受作用物質產生游離或制動輻射
電磁波型輻射純粹為一種能量，可將能量傳遞給物質，使其產生激發與游離
中子射線多由核反應產生，不帶電荷，屬間接游離輻射

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: 原子、輻射、與輻射防護, Ch.3, p.75
questions.explanation: X光與γ射線本質皆為電磁波（僅來源不同：X光來自原子軌域電子躍遷或制動輻射，γ射線來自原子核衰變），屬**電磁波型游離輻射**，並非粒子型，故A敘述錯誤。粒子型游離輻射(如α、β粒子)藉粒子動能/電位能致游離；電磁波型輻射為能量傳遞致激發游離；中子不帶電荷、多由核反應產生，須先與物質作用產生荷電粒子，屬間接游離輻射，B/C/D皆正確。

questions.questionText: 有關輻射對人體造成的生物效應以下敘述何者為非?

options.text: 確定性效應造成之損害程度取決於吸收劑量的多寡
隨機性效應特點在於損害程度與吸收劑量無關且不存在劑量閾值
隨機性效應發生的機率與吸收劑量有關
遺傳效應屬於確定性效應的一種

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: 原子、輻射、與輻射防護, Ch.13, p.566
questions.explanation: 遺傳效應(genetic effect)屬於**隨機性效應(stochastic effect)**（與輻射引致之癌病同列隨機性效應範例），並非確定性效應，故D敘述錯誤。確定性效應（如白內障、皮膚損傷、生育能力損害）損害程度隨劑量增加、存在劑量閾值；隨機性效應損害程度與劑量無關、不存在閾值、但發生機率隨劑量增加，A/B/C皆正確。

questions.questionText: Which is wrong concerning the posttreatment imaging features of pediatric musculoskeletal tumors?

options.text: The goal of treatment in benign bone tumors is removal of the tumor followed by the reestablishment of bone morphology and structural support without compromising axial growth, joint function, or overall morbidity.

Ceramic material appears denser than adjacent native bone, and a thin, well-defined radiolucent zone at the host-graft junction is an expected finding early after placement, but this radiolucent zone should disappear as osseous ingrowth occurs.
Persistent or developing radiolucency—often at the center of the graft—following graft placement may indicate tumor recurrence or graft resorption without incorporation.
Nonunion is arbitrarily defined as lack of union by 1 year and is the most frequently encountered complication in biologic reconstruction.

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Posttreatment Imaging of Pediatric Musculoskeletal Tumors, Radiographics. 2014;34(3):724-40
questions.explanation: 移植物置放後持續性或新發之透亮區(radiolucency)常見於**移植物邊緣(margin)**（非中心center），可提示腫瘤復發或移植物未整合之吸收，故C敘述之「center」有誤。良性骨腫瘤治療目標為切除並重建骨形態與結構支撐、不影響生長板/關節功能；陶瓷材料植入早期於host-graft交界處可見薄而清楚之透亮帶並隨骨整合消失；不癒合(nonunion)定義為1年內未癒合、為生物重建最常見併發症，A/B/D皆正確。

questions.questionText: Which is most likely finding of Wernicke encephalopathy?

options.text: Always associated with alcohol abuse
T2-weighted and FLAIR hyperintensities and restricted diffusion at unilateral thalamus
Post-contrast enhancement at bilateral mammillary bodies in T1-weighted image
T2-weighted and FLAIR hyperintensities at bilateral insular cortex

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Imaging Patterns of Toxic and Metabolic Brain Disorders, Radiographics. 2019 Oct;39(6):1672-1695
questions.explanation: 韋尼克氏腦病(WE)急性期常見雙側對稱T2WI/FLAIR高訊號合併擴散受限，約50%病例可見顯影劑後強化，好發於乳頭體(60%)、內側視丘(85%)、下視丘、頂蓋板與導水管周圍灰質(2/3病例)及殼核；乳頭體之顯影劑後T1強化為其較具特徵性表現。WE並非皆與酒精濫用相關(近50%與酒精無關，可見於孕吐、化療、飲食障礙、減重手術等次發性營養不良)，故A錯；病灶多雙側對稱(非單側視丘)，故B錯；雙側腦島皮質非WE典型部位，故D錯。

questions.questionText: Which is wrong about osmotic demyelination syndrome?

options.text: Commonly symmetric lesion involved oligodendrocytes-rich sites, such as the brainstem region, pons
Extra-pontine involvement at bilateral corticospinal tracts is also common
Only extra-pontine involvement can also be found
Classical MRI finding is trident-shaped lesion at central pons

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Imaging Patterns of Toxic and Metabolic Brain Disorders, Radiographics. 2019 Oct;39(6):1672-1695
questions.explanation: 滲透壓性脫髓鞘症候群(ODS)最常見腦橋外(extra-pontine)侵犯部位為基底核、視丘與大腦半球白質(常對稱)，經典病灶特徵性地保留皮質脊髓徑(corticospinal tract)區域與腦橋周邊，並非侵犯雙側皮質脊髓徑，故B敘述錯誤。經典病灶好發少突膠質細胞豐富部位(如腦橋)呈對稱性；亦可僅見腦橋外侵犯(無腦橋病灶)；經典MRI表現為中央腦橋三叉戟狀(trident-shaped)病灶，A/C/D皆正確。

questions.questionText: About posterior reversible encephalopathy syndrome(PRES), which is less likely description?

options.text: Common caused by hypoxia or toxic induced cellular edema, mainly involving gray matter
Common involving parieto-occipital lobes
Superior frontal sulcus can also be involvement
Possible progression to subarachnoid hemorrhage

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Imaging Patterns of Toxic and Metabolic Brain Disorders, Radiographics. 2019 Oct;39(6):1672-1695
questions.explanation: PRES主要因血壓調節失能或毒性作用致血管源性水腫(vasogenic edema)，主要侵犯**白質**（非灰質），皮質與皮質下區域皆可受累，故A敘述錯誤。常見侵犯頂枕葉(parieto-occipital，最典型，約90%)、額上溝型(superior frontal sulcus pattern，約70%)，並可能進展為蜘蛛膜下腔出血，B/C/D皆正確。

questions.questionText: Which condition would most likely find unilateral basal ganglions lesion in brain MRI?

options.text: 57 years old woman with chronic kidney disease and uremia
50 years old woman with cirrhosis, presented with acute hyperammonemia and conscious change
70 years old man with poor controlled type 2 diabetes mellitus, presented with involuntary movements
40 years man with alcohol abuse, presented with ocular dysfunction and ataxia

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Imaging Patterns of Toxic and Metabolic Brain Disorders, Radiographics. 2019 Oct;39(6):1672-1695
questions.explanation: 第二型糖尿病控制不良合併非自主運動(舞蹈症)之病患，MRI呈現**單側紋狀體(unilateral striatum)T1高訊號**，為糖尿病性紋狀體病變(diabetic striatopathy)之特徵表現。尿毒症/慢性腎病(A)、急性高血氨腦病(B)、酒精濫用合併眼球運動障礙與共濟失調(D，Wernicke encephalopathy)皆非典型單側基底核病灶表現。

questions.questionText: 一位30歲女性，在月經週期後，在左乳外側發現有一會痛之硬塊，到乳房外科就診，經檢查後發現病人沒有發燒，乳房皮膚無異狀。在左乳房之外上方處（OUQ）有一約3公分有壓痛之硬塊。宜先進行下列何項檢查最適合？

options.text: 磁振造影（MRI）
乳房超音波檢查（breast sonography）
乳房攝影檢查（mammography）
粗針穿刺檢查（core needle biopsy）

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Grainger & Allison's Diagnostic Radiology Essentials, 2nd ed., p.676-689; AJR 2014; 203:1142-1153
questions.explanation: 對於懷孕、哺乳中、或未滿30歲之可觸摸乳房硬塊病患，乳房超音波應為優先檢查工具；40歲以上建議先做乳房攝影(通常後續加做超音波)；30-39歲則由醫師視情況決定先做超音波或攝影。本題病患30歲，觸摸性硬塊，宜先安排乳房超音波檢查。

questions.questionText: Which type of microcalcifications in mammography dose it indicate malignancy?

options.text: popcorn
eggshell
milk of calcium
Fine pleomorphic

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Grainger & Allison's Diagnostic Radiology Essentials, 2nd ed., p.676-689
questions.explanation: Fine pleomorphic(細多形)鈣化屬可疑型態，PPV約29-58%，需歸入BI-RADS 4建議切片；popcorn、eggshell(rim)、milk of calcium皆為典型良性鈣化型態。

questions.questionText: Which type of enhancement kinetics in breast MRI dose it indicate malignancy?

options.text: Type I
Type II
Type III
Type IV

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Grainger & Allison's Diagnostic Radiology Essentials, 2nd ed., p.676-689; radiopaedia.org/articles/breast-mri-enhancement-curves
questions.explanation: 乳房MRI強化動力學曲線分三型：Type I(漸進性/持續上升，多屬良性，僅約9%惡性病灶呈此型)、Type II(高原型，初期上升後平緩，具惡性疑慮)、Type III(廓清型washout，初期快速上升後訊號下降，最強烈提示惡性)。

questions.questionText: Which one of genetic defects is not the risk of breast malignancy?

options.text: BRCA1
BRCA2

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Grainger & Allison's Diagnostic Radiology Essentials, 2nd ed., p.676-689
questions.explanation: BRCA1、BRCA2為乳癌最重要之高風險基因；TP53(p53)胚系突變(Li-Fraumeni syndrome)亦增加乳癌風險(雖為罕見成因)。「p54」並非已知之乳癌風險基因，屬不存在之虛構選項。

questions.questionText: Which statement about Axillary node levels is true?

options.text: Level 1 : superior to the superior border of pectoralis minor
Level 2: beneath pectoralis minor
Level 3: inferolateral to the inferior border of pectoralis minor.
All of above

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Grainger & Allison's Diagnostic Radiology Essentials, 2nd ed., p.676-689; radiopaedia.org/articles/axillary-lymph-nodes-1
questions.explanation: 腋窩淋巴結分level以胸小肌(pectoralis minor)為界：Level I位於胸小肌下緣以下(inferior/lateral)、Level II位於胸小肌深面(beneath/posterior)、Level III位於胸小肌上緣以上/內側(superior/medial)。故僅B(Level 2在胸小肌深面)正確；A、C之level與方位對應錯誤。

questions.questionText: Which one of the following is not recommended for using Fleischner Society Guidelines for Managing Incidental Pulmonary Nodules?

options.text: A 40-Years-old patient
Patient without known malignancy
Lung Cancer Screening Population
A 50-Years-old patient

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Updated Fleischner Society Guidelines for Managing Incidental Pulmonary Nodules: Common Questions and Challenging Scenarios, RadioGraphics Vol. 38, No. 5
questions.explanation: Fleischner偶見肺結節指引適用於35歲以上、無已知惡性病史之偶見結節病患；不適用族群包括：35歲以下病患、已知惡性病史者、免疫低下病患、肺癌篩檢族群(此族群另有專屬篩檢指引LungRADS)。40歲及50歲病患皆在適用範圍內。

questions.questionText: According to Fleischner Society Guidelines for Managing Incidental Pulmonary Nodules, when a solitary solid nodule 6-8 mm present, what is the recommendation?

options.text: no routine follow-up required
optional CT at 12 months
CT at 6-12 months, then consider CT at 18-24 months
consider CT at 3 months, PET/CT, or tissue sampling

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Updated Fleischner Society Guidelines for Managing Incidental Pulmonary Nodules, RadioGraphics Vol. 38, No. 5
questions.explanation: 單一實質結節6-8mm（無論低/高風險），建議6-12個月CT複查，再考慮18-24個月CT複查；<6mm低風險不需常規追蹤；>8mm單一結節建議考慮3個月CT、PET/CT或組織切片。

questions.questionText: Patients with influenza pneumonia show reticulonodular areas of opacity with or without focal areas of consolidation, usually in which lobe of lung?

options.text: upper lobe, unilateral
upper lobes, bilateral
lower lobes, unilateral
lower lobes, bilateral

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Radiographic and CT Features of Viral Pneumonia, RadioGraphics Vol. 38, No. 3
questions.explanation: 流感肺炎(influenza pneumonia)胸部X光典型呈雙側下肺葉(bilateral lower lobes)網狀結節狀混濁，可合併局部實質化；邊界不清之斑片狀或結節狀實質化可迅速融合，代表瀰漫性肺泡損傷或次發感染，多於3週內消退。

questions.questionText: 下列何者含碘對比劑不可使用於蜘蛛網膜腔下注射?

options.text: Ominpaque 300
Ominpaque 240
Ominpaque 180
Ominpaque 350

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: 中華民國放射線醫學會對比劑手冊(2017); 2016 ACR manual
questions.explanation: 台灣核准可用於蜘蛛網膜腔下(intrathecal)注射之Omnipaque(iohexol)劑型僅限180、240、300三種濃度；350mg I/mL濃度過高，未核准用於此途徑。

questions.questionText: What will not be found on a pulmonary hypertension patient?

options.text: mean pulmonary pressure of 25 mm Hg
pulmonary artery diameter 25 mm
pulmonary artery larger than that of the ascending aorta at the same level
nonspecific cardiovascular and respiratory symptoms including dyspnea, fatigue, chest pain or angina, and syncope

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: Approach to Pulmonary Hypertension: From CT to Clinical Diagnosis, RadioGraphics
questions.explanation: CT診斷肺高壓始於量測主肺動脈徑擴大，門檻為**>29mm**（通常較同層降主動脈徑為大），非25mm；肺高壓定義為靜息平均肺動脈壓≥25mmHg；臨床表現為非特異性心肺症狀(呼吸困難/疲倦/胸痛/暈厥)，皆為正確之肺高壓相關表現，僅B之25mm門檻數值錯誤。

questions.questionText: Which of the following is not a complication of coronary vasculitis?

options.text: aneurysmal dilatation, which can lead to rupture and hemorrhage
thrombosis
stenosis
all of the above will be seen in coronary vasculitis

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: CT and MR Imaging of Cardiothoracic Vasculitis, RadioGraphics Vol. 38, No. 4
questions.explanation: 冠狀動脈血管炎之併發症包括：動脈瘤樣擴張(可致破裂出血)、血栓形成、狹窄，三者皆為冠狀動脈血管炎之已知併發症，故答案為D(以上皆會出現於冠狀動脈血管炎)。加速性動脈粥狀硬化為冠狀動脈血管炎之共同病理途徑(與慢性發炎之致粥狀硬化效應相關)；成人以結節性多動脈炎(polyarteritis nodosa)、兒童以川崎氏病(Kawasaki disease)最常見冠狀動脈受侵犯。

questions.questionText: Which of the following about the Lake Louise consensus criteria is not correct?

options.text: T2 myocardium to skeletal muscle ratio >1.5
delayed enhancement in subepicardial and or mid-myocardium in nonischemic distribution
increased global myocardial early gadolinium enhancement ratio between myocardium and skeletal muscle in gadolinium-enhanced T1WI
all of the above is correct

questions.reference: 官方2020詳解；Ref: CT and MR Imaging of Cardiothoracic Vasculitis, RadioGraphics Vol. 38, No. 4
questions.explanation: 當局部T2高訊號不明顯無法定位發炎病灶時，可利用心肌相對骨骼肌之整體T2訊號比值輔助偵測，異常門檻為**比值≥2.0**（非>1.5）；心外膜下/壁內延遲強化(非缺血性分布)、心肌相對骨骼肌之整體早期釓增強比值增加，皆為Lake Louise準則之正確描述，僅A之比值門檻數字錯誤。
